1000662307.english: - To which Leprechaun whispered at her:

1000662308.english: Master Sergeant Impet is looking for you. Sergeant Ifrit is barely covering for you right now.
1000662308.korean: 임펫 원사님이 브라우니 찾고 있는 걸, 이프리트 하사님이 어떻게든 커버치고 있는 중이란 말이에요.

1000662309.english: You're the one who left the field fortification equipment unattended, aren't you?
1000662309.korean: 야전진지 구축 장비 방치한 거 브라우니죠?

1000662312.korean: - 쓴 웃음을 지은 것을 보면 말이다.

1000662313.english: The game center really is an interesting place.

1000662314.english: So, what shall we do next, darling?

1000662317.english: - Looking over the menu, I hesitated.
1000662317.korean: - 마시고 싶은 음료는 두 가지. 둘 다 고를 수도 있지만, 그러면 음료로 배를 채울 거 같아서 그러진 못하겠다.

1000662318.english: - Two drinks caught my eye. I could order both, but then I'd end up filling my stomach with drinks alone, so I held back.

1000662319.english: - Hmm… then I'll go with this one.
1000662319.korean: - 에이미는 내가 고민하다가 고르지 않은 다른 음료를 선택했다.

1000662320.english: - Amy chose the other drink I had been considering.

1000662321.english: - Hehe, I heard this one's really good.

1000662322.english: - A little while later, our drinks arrived.
1000662322.korean: - 역시나 맛있었지만, 에이미가 주문한 음료도 마시고 싶었는데...

1000662323.english: - Mine was delicious, of course, but Amy's looked tempting too…
1000662323.korean: 저기, 자기. 자기가 주문한 음료도 맛있어 보이는데 바꿔 먹어보지 않을래요?

1000662324.english: - Hey, darling. Yours looks good too, how about we swap and try each other's?

1000662325.korean: - 나는 반기며 에이미와 음료를 바꿔 마셨다.

1000662326.english: - Happily, I traded drinks with her.

1000662327.english: - But unlike me, who drank without hesitation, Amy hesitated.
1000662327.korean: - 그러나 내가 거리낌 없이 마시는 것과 달리 에이미는 머뭇거렸다.

1000662329.english: - Amy spoke after a short pause.

1000662331.english: - At the innocent remark of a Bioroid born for the art of seduction, I couldn't help but cough.
1000662331.korean: - 미인계를 위해서 태어난 바이오로이드의 순진한 발언에 나도 모르게 기침을 했다.

1000662333.english: - Amy said that and then drank the beverage I gave her.
1000662333.korean: - 에이미는 그렇게 말하고 내가 준 음료를 마셨다.

1000662334.english: I can taste you in it.

1000662335.english: - Watching her freely shift between innocence and allure, I realized again that she truly was born for seduction.
1000662335.korean: - 순진한 모습과 고혹적인 모습을 자유자재로 오가는 그녀를 보며 그녀는 역시나 미인계를 위해서 태어난 존재라는 것을 알았다.

1000662338.english: - From the game center to the café and then the theater, not a single problem arose.
1000662338.korean: - 게임센터부터 시작해서 카페, 극장을 거치는 동안에 약간의 문제도 생기지 않았다.

1000662339.english: - And that made me feel something was off.

1000662340.english: - Soon, I realized the reason for that strangeness.
1000662340.korean: - 그리고 곧 그 이상함의 원인을 알아차렸다.

1000662341.english: - Amy was matching me in everything.
1000662341.korean: - 에이미가 내 모든 것에 맞춰주고 있었다.

1000662342.english: - Thinking back, whenever I wanted something, Amy would naturally make it possible for me to do it.
1000662342.korean: - 생각해보니 내가 뭔가를 바라면 에이미는 자연스럽게 내가 그것을 할 수 있게 도와줬다.

1000662343.english: - From the game center until now.

1000662344.english: - A date shouldn't just be about one person's enjoyment…
1000662344.korean: - 데이트라는 것이 한 사람만 즐겁기 위한 게 아닐 텐데...

1000662345.english: - Yet even if I asked Amy what she wanted to do, she would probably brush it off.
1000662345.korean: - 지금 내가 에이미에게 하고 싶은 것이 있냐고 물어도 에이미는 대충 얼버무리고 말 것 같았다.

1000662346.english: - So, while wandering around the base, I observed her carefully.
1000662346.korean: - 그래서 나는 거점을 돌아다니는 동안에 에이미를 열심히 관찰했다.

1000662348.english: - I noticed Amy's gaze linger just a little longer at one spot.
1000662348.korean: - 나는 에이미가 문득 한 곳에 시선을 오래 두는 것을 발견했다.

1000662349.english: - Only slightly longer than anywhere else, but it was enough.
1000662349.korean: - 다른 곳보다 아주 약간 더 머물러있었을 뿐이지만 그거면 충분했다.

1000662350.english: Hm? Ah… a wedding… photo studio.

1000662352.english: - Until now, she had gone along with everything for my sake, but this time she hesitated a little…
1000662352.korean: - 지금까지 뭘 해도 나에게 맞춰주던 그녀는 조금 주저하더니...

1000662357.english: Um… darling… do I look strange?

1000662358.english: - Seeing Amy sitting in a chair in a wedding dress, I couldn't stop grinning.
1000662358.korean: - 웨딩드레스를 입은 채 의자에 앉아있는 에이미를 보고 있으니 계속 웃음이 나왔다.

1000662359.english: - Not only because she was beautiful… but because the way she looked awkward yet happy was utterly endearing.
1000662359.korean: - 예쁜 것도 예쁜 것이지만... 어색해하면서도 기뻐하는 에이미가 너무 사랑스러워서.

1000662360.english: - I wondered if this was how Amy had felt when she matched herself to me all along.
1000662360.korean: - 에이미가 이전까지 나에게 맞춰주었을 때도 이런 기분이었을까 하는 생각이 들었다.

1000662363.english: - Amy fiddled with the dress as she spoke.

1000662364.english: As you know, we models often wear all sorts of outfits for missions.
1000662364.korean: 알다시피 저희 모델들은 작전을 위해 여러 의상을 입곤 했어요.

1000662366.english: But I don't think I was ever this happy.

1000662367.english: - The spy who skillfully adapted to her partner during the date was gone, replaced by a blushing woman smiling softly.
1000662367.korean: - 능숙하게 상대에게 맞춰주면서 데이트를 하던 스파이의 모습은 사라지고, 얼굴을 붉히며 미소 짓는 한 명의 여성이 있었다.

1000662368.english: Thank you, darling. For making me this happy.
1000662368.korean: 고마워요, 자기. 저를 이렇게 행복하게 해줘서.

1000662369.english: - With tears of emotion welling up, Amy smiled.
1000662369.korean: - 감동으로 살짝 눈물이 맺힌 채 에이미가 웃었다.

1000662370.english: - And if even this appearance was just part of her seduction…

1000662371.english: - I would still fall for it knowingly.

1000662372.english: - I held Amy's hand and kissed the back of it.
1000662372.korean: - 나는 에이미의 손을 잡고 손등에 입을 맞췄다.

1000662373.english: - Then, lifting my head, I kissed her lips, catching her off guard after the sudden kiss on her hand.
1000662373.korean: - 그리고 고개를 들고 나의 갑작스러운 손등 키스에 놀라 굳어있는 에이미의 입술에 입을 맞췄다.

1000662376.english: - Soon, she wrapped her arms around my neck and accepted my kiss.
1000662376.korean: - 곧 내 목에 팔을 두르며 내 입맞춤을 받아주었다.

1000662377.english: - After the wedding photo studio, the rest of the date felt meaningless, so we decided to return to the dormitory.
1000662377.korean: - 웨딩 촬영 스튜디오 이후의 데이트는 의미가 없었기에 숙소로 돌아가기로 했다.

1000662378.english: - I wanted Amy. Amy wanted me.
1000662378.korean: - 내가 에이미를. 에이미가 나를 바라고 있었다.

1000662379.english: - Whenever our desire grew too strong, Amy led me to a secluded spot.
1000662379.korean: - 중간중간에 갈망이 너무 강해질 때마다 에이미는 나를 인적이 드문 곳으로 이끌었다.

1000662380.english: - There, with deep kisses, we subdued our longing before quickly heading back toward the dorm.
1000662380.korean: - 그곳에서 진한 입맞춤으로 갈망을 잠재우고 빠른 걸음으로 숙소로 향했다.

1000662381.english: - And when we were almost there…
1000662381.korean: - 그리고 숙소에 거의 다 도달했을 때...

1000662385.english: Where are you rushing off to like that?

1000662387.english: I'm on a date with the Commander today.

1000662388.english: Ah! Right! You said you had a date!

1000662389.english: That's so nice… I wanted to go on a date too…

1000662390.english: - LRL kept glancing between Amy and me.

1000662391.english: - Just as I was about to comfort her, Amy spoke.
1000662391.korean: - 내가 LRL을 달래주려고 할 때, 에이미가 말했다.

1000662392.english: Hmm… then how about the three of us play together?

1000662393.english: Really? Yay! I really, really love you, Amy!

1000662394.english: - At Amy's suggestion, LRL jumped up and down with joy.
1000662394.korean: - 에이미의 제안에 LRL은 신나서 방방 뛰었다.

1000662395.english: - And I, already burning inside, could only stand there blankly.
1000662395.korean: - 그리고 몸이 잔뜩 달아있었던 나는 멍하니 서 있었다.

1000662397.english: Please go along with the date just a little. It's my wish.

1000662398.english: Come! Retainer! I command you, lead us to the eternal abode of the Mother of Happiness!
1000662398.korean: 자! 권속이여! 짐이 명하노니, 짐과 행복의 성모의 영원한 보금자리로 이끌도록 하여라!

1000662399.english: - LRL grabbed both our hands and hopped along.
1000662399.korean: - LRL은 나와 에이미의 손을 잡고 방방 뛰었다.

1000662401.english: - And I laughed at seeing the two of them so happy.
1000662401.korean: - 나는 두 사람이 행복해하는 모습에 웃었다.

1000662403.english: - The time spent in Amy and LRL's room was truly delightful.
1000662403.korean: - 에이미와 LRL의 방에서 보내는 시간은 무척 즐거웠다.

1000662404.english: Hehe! Retainer, you still have a long way to go to keep up with me!
1000662404.korean: 후후! 권속이여 아직 짐을 따라오려면 멀었구나!

1000662405.english: Give it up, darling. You said the same thing earlier. Our princess is a master of this game.
1000662405.korean: 포기하세요, 자기. 그 말 조금 전에도 했잖아요. 우리 공주님은 이 게임의 달인이라고요.

1000662407.english: Take this, Retainer! I grant you my drawing, a blessing for today!
1000662407.korean: 받아라, 권속이여. 오늘을 축복하기 위한 짐의 그림을 하사하노라.

1000662408.english: Oh my, princess, what about mine?

1000662409.english: Hm? Uh… ah… I-I'll draw it right now!
1000662409.korean: 응? 으응? 으... 지... 지금 그릴게!

1000662410.english: Hehe, then I should return the favor with one of my own, right?

1000662412.english: Receive my gaze, Dragonslayer! I entrust you with my eyes and my future!
1000662412.korean: 내 눈을 받거라, 용살자여! 짐은 그대에게 내 사안과 미래를 맡기노라!

1000662413.english: My eyes may lose their light, but I do not doubt the future you open will shine with hope!
1000662413.korean: 내 눈은 빛을 잃겠으나 그대가 열 미래는 희망으로 찬란하리라는 것을 나는 의심치 않는다!

1000662414.english: Uh… everyone, get ready. The dread dragon Nidhogg approaches.
1000662414.korean: 어... 모두 준비해라. 최흉의 악룡 니드호그가 온다.

1000662415.english: Amy… Glacias doesn't talk like that…
1000662415.korean: 에이미... 글라시아스는 그런 말투 안 써...

1000662419.english: It's the date-support tool the Doctor gave us.

1000662420.english: Haha! Look at this! The flowers keep coming out.
1000662420.korean: 하하! 이것 봐! 꽃이 계속 나와.

1000662422.english: - We played with the Doctor's secret tools.

1000662423.english: - Happy times passed by so quickly.

1000662425.english: - After laughing, chatting, and playing so excitedly, LRL suddenly began nodding off.
1000662425.korean: - 신나게 웃고 떠들고 놀던 LRL은 갑자기 꾸벅꾸벅 졸기 시작했다.

1000662426.english: Our princess. It seems it's time for her to sleep.
1000662426.korean: 우리 공주님. 잘 때가 되었나 보네요.

1000662428.english: - Amy smiled and laid LRL down on the bed.

1000662429.english: - Then she lay down beside her.

1000662431.english: - Amy gestured for me to lie down too, so I did.
1000662431.korean: - 에이미가 손짓으로 나에게 옆에 누우라고 하기에 그렇게 했다.

1000662432.english: - With LRL between us, we lay together on the bed.
1000662432.korean: - LRL을 사이에 두고 우리는 침대에 누웠다.

1000662433.english: - But since the bed was small, I could be close to both of them.
1000662433.korean: - 하지만 좁은 만큼 두 사람과 가까이 있을 수 있었다.

1000662434.english: - While putting LRL to sleep, Amy glanced at me and our eyes met.
1000662434.korean: - 에이미는 LRL을 재우다가 살짝 시선을 돌려 나와 눈을 마주쳤다.

1000662436.english: - When Amy smiled, I couldn't help but smile too.
1000662436.korean: - 에이미가 웃자 나도 절로 웃음이 나왔다.

1000662438.english: Because you're happy, I'm even happier.

1000662439.english: - I had no choice but to admit it.

1000662440.english: What are you talking about, darling.

1000662441.english: I've always been sincere with you.

1000662442.english: From the moment I first met you, until now, and forevermore, I have been, I am, and I will be sincere with you.
1000662442.korean: 자기를 처음 만나고, 지금까지, 그리고 앞으로도 저는 자기에게 진심이었고, 진심이고, 진심일 거예요.

1000662443.english: Of course, I'm a weapon. A weapon that kills people in very cruel ways.
1000662443.korean: 물론 저는 무기에요. 그것도... 아주 잔인한 방법으로 상대를 죽이는 무기.

1000662444.english: If I had been born earlier, I would have killed, and killed again… and in the end, I would have killed the one I loved too.
1000662444.korean: 만약 예전에 태어났다면, 전 사람을 죽이고, 또 죽이고... 결국 사랑하게 된 사람도 죽이게 됐겠죠.

1000662445.english: But since I met you, I'm different.

1000662446.english: You've already granted me one of my wishes…
1000662446.korean: 벌써 제 소원 한 가지를 이뤄주셨지만...

1000662447.english: - Amy smiled and reached out her hand to me.

1000662448.english: - I held it, lacing our fingers together.
1000662448.korean: - 나는 그 손을 잡아 깍지를 꼈다.

1000662451.english: Would you like to hear my other wish?

1000662452.korean: - 또 다른 소원을 바라는 것을 보면...

1000662453.english: - But she was a lovely greedy one.

1000662454.english: I want to build a family.

1000662455.english: For a Bioroid… especially one made to steal information and assassinate through seduction… to dream of such a thing…
1000662455.korean: 감히 바이오로이드가... 그것도 미인계를 통해 정보를 빼돌리고 암살을 하기 위해 만들어진 바이오로이드가 그런 소원을 꿈꾸다니...

1000662457.english: But… at least wishing for it, pretending it, I'd like to be allowed that much.
1000662457.korean: 하지만... 바라는 것 정도는, 흉내를 내는 것 정도는 허락받고 싶어요.

1000662458.english: - Amy smiled wistfully as she adjusted LRL's hair.
1000662458.korean: - 에이미는 쓸쓸한 미소를 지으며 LRL의 머리를 정돈했다.

1000662459.english: I want to be someone's wife, and the mother of a cute child.
1000662459.korean: 누군가의 아내이자 귀여운 아이의 엄마가 되고 싶어요.

1000662460.english: Not only me, but even the Amy Razers of the past longed for this wish.
1000662460.korean: 저뿐만이 아니라 과거의 에이미 레이저들도 바라던 소원.

1000662461.english: Though it's only an illusion… right now, I'm very happy, darling.
1000662461.korean: 비록 모습뿐이지만… 지금의 전 무척이나 행복해요, 자기.

1000662462.english: - Seeing her smile bitterly while saying she was happy made my chest ache.
1000662462.korean: - 씁쓸한 미소를 지으며 행복하다고 말하는 그녀의 모습에 가슴이 아렸다.

1000662463.english: - Just as I was about to say something, Amy spoke first.
1000662463.korean: - 내가 무언가 말하려고 하자 에이미가 먼저 말했다.

1000662464.english: Shh. Darling. Please don't say anything now.
1000662464.korean: 쉿. 자기. 지금은 아무 말도 하지 말아주세요.

1000662465.english: Because whatever you say will trouble you, and whatever you say will hurt me, or someone else.
1000662465.korean: 지금 자기가 어떤 말을 하면 자기가 곤란해지고, 어떤 말을 하면 저 혹은 누군가가 상처 받을 테니까요.

1000662466.english: So just for now, for this moment, let me enjoy the happiness.
1000662466.korean: 그러니 지금, 이 순간만큼은 지금의 행복을 누리게 해주세요.

1000662467.english: - I swallowed back the words I wanted to say, just as Amy asked.
1000662467.korean: - 나는 에이미의 말대로 하려던 말을 삼켰다.

1000662468.english: - But there was one thing I could say that Amy would accept.
1000662468.korean: - 그러나 지금 하는 말은 에이미도 받아주리라.

1000662471.english: - Amy smiled, the bitterness gone from her face.
1000662471.korean: - 에이미는 씁쓸한 기색이 사라진 미소를 지었다.

1000662472.english: - We held hands and looked into each other's eyes for a long time.
1000662472.korean: - 우리는 손을 맞잡은 채 한참을 서로를 마주봤다.

1000662473.english: - How much time passed, I don't know…

1000662475.english: It seems… our princess has fallen asleep…

1000662476.english: Shall we now spend some intimate time together?
1000662476.korean: 이제는 두 사람의 단란한 시간을 보내도 되지 않을까요?

1000662477.english: - After confirming that LRL was asleep, we carefully left the bed, then the room.
1000662477.korean: - 우리는 LRL이 잠든 것을 확인한 후 조심스럽게 침대에서, 방에서 벗어났다.

1000662478.english: - Once the door was closed, I lifted Amy into my arms.
1000662478.korean: - 문을 닫은 이후 나는 에이미를 들어 안았다.

1000662480.english: - Amy let out a small but joyful scream and clung to me.
1000662480.korean: - 에이미는 작지만 기쁨에 겨운 비명소리를 지르고 나에게 매달렸다.

1000662482.english: - Holding Amy, I ran straight to my room.
1000662482.korean: - 나는 에이미를 안은 채로 내 방으로 달려갔다.

1000662483.english: - In my arms as I ran.

1000662485.english: - No, from the moment we first met until now. And forevermore.
1000662485.korean: - 아니, 처음 만났을 때부터 지금까지. 그리고 앞으로도 쭈욱.

1000662486.english: - There was not a spy using seduction.
1000662486.korean: - 미인계를 쓰는 한 명의 스파이가 아닌.

1000662487.english: - There was only a woman who wanted to build a happy family.
1000662487.korean: - 행복한 가정을 꾸리고 싶어 하는 한 명의 여성만 있었다.

1000662488.english: - When I first learned about the dating contest, I had no intention of refusing any suggestion from the members, as long as it stayed "within the bounds of common sense."
1000662488.korean: - 데이트 공모전에 대해서 알게 되었을 때, 나는 대원들이 ‘상식을 지키는 영역 내에서’ 어떤 컨셉으로 데이트를 제안해도 거부할 생각이 없었다.

1000662489.english: - Be it extreme hell training to test human limits, nonstop deathmatch movie or anime marathons, or even sweet-talking banquets of the underworld…
1000662489.korean: - 인간의 한계를 시험하는 극한의 지옥훈련이나, 데스매치 논스톱 영화 혹은 애니 시청회, 알콩달콩 황천의 시식회 같은 것은 물론이요…

1000662490.english: - Even SM, exposure, or roleplay—I was prepared…
1000662490.korean: - SM, 노출, 상황극 같은 것도 할 각오…

1000662491.english: - No, calling it "prepared" makes it sound like I'm looking down on members who wanted such dates.
1000662491.korean: - 아니, 각오라고 말하니 이런 데이트를 원하는 대원들을 비하하는 것 같다.

1000662492.english: - I was ready to enjoy it.

1000662493.english: - But when I arrived at the meeting spot for today's date with Frigga, I realized how naïve I'd been.
1000662493.korean: - 하지만 오늘 데이트 상대인 프리가와의 약속장소에 도착했을 때, 나는 내가 얼마나 안일했는지 깨달았다.

1000662494.english: - When I got there, Frigga had already arrived.
1000662494.korean: - 약속장소에 도착하니 프리가가 이미 도착해 있었다.

1000662495.english: - Was it a problem that I was later than her?

1000662496.english: - No. Well, technically yes, but since I still arrived earlier than the promised time, it wasn't a big issue.
1000662496.korean: - 아니다. 아니, 문제긴 한데 원래 약속시간보다 일찍 도착했으니 큰 문제는 아니다.

1000662497.english: - Was it a problem that Frigga was wearing a very revealing bikini?
1000662497.korean: - 프리가가 노출도가 높은 비키니를 입고 있어서 문제냐고?

1000662498.english: - No, not really. Who am I to talk? This is Orca, after all…
1000662498.korean: - 아니, 내가 할 말은 아니지만… 오르카에서 뭘 새삼스레…

1000662499.english: - And I almost wore a reverse bunny suit myself… ahem! ahem!
1000662499.korean: - 그리고 나도 역바니를 입을 뻔… 크흠! 크흠!

1000662500.english: - Was it because Frigga, influenced by bear genetics, was wearing a cow-pattern bikini, thigh-high socks, opera gloves, and a headband with cow ears and horns?
1000662500.korean: - 곰의 유전자에 영향을 받고 있는 프리가가 젖소무늬 비키니와 사이 하이 삭스, 오페라 글러브를 착용하고 젖소귀와 뿔이 달린 머리띠를 쓰고 있어서?

1000662501.english: - If I wanted to make an issue of that, I should've done it long ago.
1000662501.korean: - 거기에 대해서 문제 삼을 거면 옛날에 문제 삼았지.

1000662502.english: - She was probably sponsored with an Elven Milk costume.
1000662502.korean: - 아마 엘븐 밀크 복장을 지원받은 것이리라.

1000662504.english: - The single item Frigga was holding was enough to push her danger level to the extreme.
1000662504.korean: - 프리가가 들고 있는 하나의 물건은 프리가의 위험도를 극악으로 올리기에 충분했다.

1000662505.english: - A baby bottle, the epitome of harmlessness seen everywhere.
1000662505.korean: - 어디에서도 볼 수 있는 무해함의 극치인 젖병.

1000662506.english: - A bottle meant to feed infants formula, water, or breast milk.
1000662506.korean: - 젖병이라 함은 아기들에게 분유나 물 혹은 모유 같은 것을 먹이기 위한 도구.

1000662507.english: - But Orca has no babies, due to its circumstances.
1000662507.korean: - 하지만 오르카의 사정상 오르카에는 아기가 없다.

1000662508.english: - So why was Frigga Holding a baby bottle in such a situation?
1000662508.korean: - 그런 상황에서 프리가가 젖병을 들고 있는 이유는 무엇일까?

1000662509.english: - I didn't know. No, I didn't want to know. But I did know.
1000662509.korean: - 모르겠다. 아니, 알고 싶지 않다. 그러나 나는 알고 있다.

1000662510.english: - I knew that if I turned my eyes away from reality, the harm of ignorance would swallow me whole.
1000662510.korean: - 현실에서 눈을 돌리면 무지의 폐해가 나를 덮치리라는 것도.

1000662512.english: - She intended to do infant play with me!

1000662513.english: - The moment I was caught in Frigga's hands, I would be drawn by her gentle yet overwhelming strength and placed on those soft thighs.
1000662513.korean: - 프리가의 손에 잡히는 그 순간 나는 자애로운 괴력에 이끌려 저 부드러운 허벅지 위에 앉게 되리라.

1000662514.english: - Seated on her lap, Frigga would smile like a holy mother and embrace me tenderly.
1000662514.korean: - 나를 허벅지 위에 앉힌 프리가는 성모 같은 미소를 지으며 나를 상냥하게 끌어안아주겠지.

1000662515.english: - Then, buried in Frigga's overflowing maternal love (her chest), I would lose the last remnants of resistance, consumed by the comfort she gave.
1000662515.korean: - 그러면 나는 프리가의 넘치는 모성애(가슴)에 파묻혀 그나마 남아있던 저항심을 잃고 프리가가 주는 안도감에 잠식되리라.

1000662516.english: - Having broken my will to resist, Frigga would let out a benevolent laugh and stroke my head, sending my mind into a daze.
1000662516.korean: - 나의 저항의지를 모두 꺾은 프리가는 인자한 웃음소리를 내며 내 머리를 쓰다듬어 나의 정신을 혼미하게 만들겠지.

1000662517.english: - Then she would place that baby bottle in my mouth, and gently rock me as I drank.
1000662517.korean: - 그리고 프리가는 완전히 무방비 상태가 된 나의 입에 저 젖병을 물려주고 천천히 나를 부둥부둥해줄 것이다.

1000662518.english: - After emptying the bottle, I would feel something lacking, and crave to suck on something other than the bottle—and Frigga would gladly provide it.
1000662518.korean: - 젖병을 모두 비우게 된 이후 나는 부족함을 느끼고 젖병이 아닌 다른 것을 빨기를 원할 것이고, 프리가는 반기며 나에게 그것을 제공하겠지.

1000662519.english: - And from that moment on, I would never again return to the person I was before that experience.
1000662519.korean: - 그리고 나는 다시는 그 일을 겪기 이전의 나로 돌아갈 수 없게 될 것이다.

1000662520.english: - I'm someone who has overcome countless hardships.

1000662521.english: - Of course, I still had a hidden card—the right to refuse the date.
1000662521.korean: - 물론 나에게는 데이트 거부권이라는 히든 카드가 있다.

1000662524.english: - I didn't want to disappoint Frigga, who welcomed me with a smile when she saw me.
1000662524.korean: - 나를 보자 웃으며 반기는 프리가를 실망시키고 싶지 않았다.

1000662525.english: - Not out of obligation, but because I too was looking forward to this date with Frigga.
1000662525.korean: - 의무감 때문이 아니라 나 역시도 프리가와의 데이트를 기대하고 있다.

1000662526.english: - It would have been really nice if it weren't for that baby bottle…

1000662527.english: - But this is ultimately my problem.

1000662528.english: - Today's date will be a stage to test my will and my manliness.
1000662528.korean: - 오늘 데이트는 나의 의지와 나의 남자다움을 시험하는 무대가 될 것이다.

1000662529.english: - I'll show as much of my manly side as possible so that Frigga won't even think of trying age-play.
1000662529.korean: - 최대한 나의 남자다운 모습을 보여줘서 프리가가 유아플레이를 시도할 생각자체를 못하게 만들겠다.

1000662533.english: There are many times when I zone out, lost in thought.
1000662533.korean: 무언가에 정신이 팔려 멍하니 있을 때가 많고.

1000662534.english: At night, I can't fall asleep properly.

1000662535.english: Even during work, I got distracted by something and made mistakes.
1000662535.korean: 또 업무 중에도 무언가를 신경 쓰느라 실수를 해버렸어요.

1000662536.english: Up to this point, I can laugh it off. The mistakes weren't fatal, and thanks to my colleagues' help, I was able to recover.
1000662536.korean: 여기까지는 웃으며 넘어갈 수 있어요. 실수도 치명적이지 않고 동료분들께서 도와주셔서 수습할 수 있었으니까요.

1000662537.english: The problem is… I can't fix the root cause of those mistakes.
1000662537.korean: 문제가 있다면… 실수의 근본원인을 해결할 수 없는 거겠네요.

1000662538.english: It's not that I don't know the cause…

1000662539.english: No, maybe that makes it an even bigger problem…

1000662541.english: I've been overly conscious of my master.

1000662542.english: When I sit still, I think of Master.

1000662543.english: When I lie down to sleep, I wish Master were beside me…
1000662543.korean: 자기 위해 누웠을 때에는 주인님이 곁에 있기를 바라죠…

1000662544.english: During escort missions, I push myself without realizing it, just to catch Master's eye.
1000662544.korean: 호위임무 중에는 주인님의 눈에 들고 싶어서 저도 모르게 무리하고 만답니다.

1000662545.english: So far, I've been lucky and nothing serious has happened, but sooner or later, something irreversible will occur.
1000662545.korean: 지금까지는 운이 좋아서 큰일이 생기지 않았지만 나중에 분명 돌이킬 수 없는 일이 일어나겠지요.

1000662546.english: Yes. Of course, I like Master.

1000662547.english: I want to cherish and embrace Master.

1000662548.english: But my feelings now go beyond simple affection.
1000662548.korean: 하지만 지금의 이 감정은 단순히 좋아함을 넘어서요.

1000662549.english: It's closer to desire, craving, longing.

1000662550.english: ……The cute bodyguard from the neighboring unit once spoke about the qualifications of an escort.
1000662550.korean: ……옆부대의 귀여운 보디가드가 호위의 자격에 대해서 말했어요.

1000662551.english: "Never take your eyes off the Commander"…

1000662554.english: By that standard, I am disqualified as an escort…

1000662555.english: The fact that I've recently been failing to perform my duties properly is proof of that.
1000662555.korean: 최근에 제가 제 임무를 제대로 수행하지 못하는 것이 그 증거겠죠.

1000662556.english: While I was struggling day by day with my feelings, I was given this chance for a date.
1000662556.korean: 제 마음 때문에 하루하루 힘들어하던 중에 얻게 된 데이트 기회.

1000662557.english: I want to use this date to get my feelings under control.
1000662557.korean: 저는 이번 데이트를 하면서 저의 마음을 다잡으려고 해요.

1000662558.english: To see Master not as a man, but as someone to protect, someone to take care of.
1000662558.korean: 주인님을 남자가 아닌, 보호의 대상, 보살펴드려야 하는 대상으로 볼 수 있게 말이죠.

1000662559.english: If my maternal instinct grows stronger, I'll be able to do that, right?

1000662560.english: I've prepared the outfit and props to strengthen my resolve and wait for Master at the date spot.
1000662560.korean: 제 각오를 다지기 위한 복장과 도구를 준비하고 데이트 장소에서 주인님을 기다립니다.

1000662562.english: The moment I saw Master coming from afar, joy surged through me, far beyond mere gladness.
1000662562.korean: 저 멀리서 주인님께서 오시는 것을 보자마자 반가움을 넘어서는 기쁨이 샘솟습니다.

1000662564.english: Today will be both a joyful and painful day for me.
1000662564.korean: 오늘은 저에게 기쁘면서도 힘든 하루가 될 것 같아요.

1000662565.english: But with the will of the bear, I'll achieve what I desire.
1000662565.korean: 하지만 곰의 의지를 발휘하여 제가 바라는 바를 이루겠어요.

1000662568.english: - I came to the game center.

1000662569.english: - Frigga looked around eagerly, as if it was her first time in a game center.
1000662569.korean: - 프리가는 게임센터는 처음 왔는지 열심히 주위를 두리번거렸다.

1000662570.english: - I, not being here for the first time, also looked around for something in particular.
1000662570.korean: - 나는 처음 온 것은 아니지만 찾는 것이 있어서 주위를 두리번거렸다.

1000662571.english: - Since it wasn't something I usually paid attention to, it took some time, but I found what I was looking for.
1000662571.korean: - 평소에는 관심을 가지지 않는 것이라 시간은 걸렸지만 원하던 것을 찾았다.

1000662573.english: - I had seen in works from the old era that men competed over their manliness through the punching machine's score.
1000662573.korean: - 구시대의 작품에서 남자들이 펀치머신의 점수로 남자다움을 경쟁하는 것을 봤기 때문이다.

1000662574.english: - It's not that I don't question whether manliness can really be decided by something like this, but if the old works said so, then so be it.
1000662574.korean: - 뭔 이런 걸로 남자다움이 정해지나 싶은 의문이 없는 것은 아니지만 구시대의 작품이 그랬다면 그런 거겠지.

1000662576.english: - No, it's also my first time coming to a game center.

1000662577.english: - I taught Frigga how to play the punching machine.

1000662578.english: - It was my first time trying it too, but I had seen others do it, so it should be fine… it's a simple machine anyway…
1000662578.korean: - 나도 펀치머신을 해보는 것은 처음이지만 다른 사람이 하는 건 본 적이 있으니 맞겠지… 단순한 기계이기도 하고…

1000662579.english: - I took a deep breath and threw my fist with all my might.
1000662579.korean: - 심호흡을 하고 있는 힘껏 주먹을 내질렀다.

1000662580.english: - With a bang! the score on the machine went up.
1000662580.korean: - 쾅! 소리와 함께 펀치머신의 점수가 올라갔다.

1000662582.english: - Since it's a four-digit scoreboard, that's probably close to the maximum.
1000662582.korean: - 네 자리 수 점수판이니 거의 최고점이겠지.

1000662588.english: - Frigga stood before the punching machine, steadied her breath for a moment…
1000662588.korean: - 프리가는 펀치머신 앞에 서서 잠시 숨을 골라…

1000662593.english: - We froze in front of the destroyed machine.
1000662593.korean: - 우리는 박살 난 펀치머신 앞에서 잠시 굳어 있었다.

1000662594.english: - Just before I could say something insane like "one more round" to redeem myself…
1000662594.korean: - 내가 설욕하기 위해 ‘한 판 더 해’라는 정신나간 소리를 하기 직전…

1000662595.english: Who goes there! Who made that bang noise!

1000662596.english: - Tomo rushed over, and I immediately apologized.

1000662597.english: - Tomo saw the wrecked machine, froze for a moment, then shouted at me.
1000662597.korean: - 토모는 박살 난 펀치머신을 보고 잠시 얼빠져 있다가 나에게 외쳤다.

1000662598.english: How could someone who knows game center tickets well do this!
1000662598.korean: 게임센터 겜티켓을 잘 아는 사람이 이러면 어떡해!

1000662599.english: Why'd you have to show off your "mountain-splitting might" on our punching machine!
1000662599.korean: 역발산기’계’세를 왜 하필 우리 펀치머신에다가 보여주냐고!

1000662601.english: Hold on. Let me give a piece of my mind to whoever's just stupidly strong!
1000662601.korean: 잠시만. 이 무식하게 힘만 센 누구 좀 혼내고!

1000662604.english: I… broke the punching machine… I'm sorry…

1000662607.english: Put your hand on your chest and think about it.

1000662611.english: When Steel Line Arcade came out, you hogged one machine for hours.
1000662611.korean: 스틸라인 아케이드 나왔을 때 혼자서 기계 하나 몇 시간 동안 붙잡고 있었지.

1000662612.english: You squeezed into a tiny karaoke booth with five or six people and sang.
1000662612.korean: 좁디좁은 노래방기계에 대여섯 명이랑 같이 들어가서 노래 불렀지.

1000662613.english: You found a game bug, exploited it, and spread it around.
1000662613.korean: 게임 버그 발견하고 버그 플레이하면서 그거 유포시켰지.

1000662614.english: And just recently, you got kicked out of an escape room café for trying to do something indecent, didn't you?
1000662614.korean: 그리고 얼마 전에 방탈출카페에서 음란행위 하려다가 걸려서 쫓겨났다며?

1000662615.english: - I took Tomo's scolding like a man without making excuses.
1000662615.korean: - 나는 남자답게 변명하지 않고 토모에게 혼났다.

1000662619.english: I came to this place called the game center with Master.

1000662620.english: It was like another world, the first time I'd ever seen such a place.

1000662621.english: While I was wondering what I could do in a game center I had never been to before…
1000662621.korean: 난생처음 와본 게임센터에서 제가 무엇을 할 수 있을지 고민할 때…

1000662623.english: Master told me about a game I could try.
1000662623.korean: 주인님께서는 제가 할 수 있을 만한 게임을 알려주셨답니다.

1000662624.english: When Master showed me first and then encouraged me, I was so happy that I swung my fist with all my strength.
1000662624.korean: 주인님께서 먼저 본을 보이시고 저에게 권유하셨을 때, 저는 그게 너무 기뻐서 있는 힘껏 주먹을 휘둘렀죠.

1000662625.english: And then the machine ended up breaking.

1000662626.english: When I was frozen from what I had done, Miss Tomo ran over to find the culprit.
1000662626.korean: 제가 제가 저지른 짓에 굳어 있을 때, 토모 양이 달려와서 범인을 찾았어요.

1000662627.english: At that moment, Master stepped forward and apologized first.

1000662628.english: Even though it was my fault…

1000662629.english: I confessed my mistake to Miss Tomo and was forgiven, but I still felt dejected because Master was scolded because of me.
1000662629.korean: 토모 양께 제 잘못을 고백하고 용서도 받았지만 주인님께서 저 때문에 혼이 난 것이 죄송스러워 의기소침해버렸습니다.

1000662630.english: However, Master just smiled, suggested another game to me, and even showed me how to play.
1000662630.korean: 하지만 주인님께서는 웃으시면서 저에게 다른 게임을 권유하고 어떻게 하는지 알려주셨어요.

1000662631.english: Thanks to that, although it was my first time visiting a game center, I came to realize that the game center is such a fun place.
1000662631.korean: 덕분에 저는 게임센터를 처음 와봤지만 게임센터가 무척이나 즐거운 장소라는 것을 알게 되었답니다.

1000662632.english: This is surely… because I was with Master.

1000662633.english: As long as I am with Master, anywhere will be joyful and happy.
1000662633.korean: 주인님과 함께라면 그 어느 곳이더라도 즐겁고 행복하겠죠.

1000662635.english: But… even so, I will accomplish my goal.
1000662635.korean: 하지만… 그래도 저는 제 목적을 달성하고 말겠어요.

1000662638.english: - We came to an outdoor restaurant.

1000662639.english: Yes. For me, pancakes topped with honey and fruit, please.
1000662639.korean: 네. 저는 꿀과 과일을 토핑한 팬케이크요.

1000662640.english: - I pretended to hesitate, but I had already decided what to eat.
1000662640.korean: - 일부러 고민하는 척했지만 내가 먹을 메뉴는 이미 골라뒀다.

1000662642.english: - Today I feel like eating a set meal, but still—for men, it's meat.
1000662642.korean: - 오늘은 백반을 먹고 싶은 기분이지만 남자는 고기지.

1000662645.english: - I ordered pancakes topped with honey and fruit, and steak with no vegetables or sauce on the side—just the meat.
1000662645.korean: - 꿀과 과일을 토핑한 팬케이크랑 곁들이는 채소나 소스 없이 고기만 있는 스테이크를 주문했다.

1000662646.english: - Just As I finished ordering, Frigga cut in.
1000662646.korean: - 내가 주문을 마쳤을 때 프리가가 끼어들었다.

1000662647.english: Ah. Make the pancakes five servings, please.

1000662648.english: - At Frigga's extra order, I instinctively felt a crisis in my masculinity.
1000662648.korean: - 프리가의 추가주문에 나는 본능적으로 나의 남성성의 위기를 느꼈다.

1000662649.english: - I don't know exactly what masculinity is since there's nothing to compare it to… but still, I felt I couldn't let myself seem inferior to Frigga.
1000662649.korean: - 비교할 대상이 없기에 정확하게 남성성이라는 것을 모르겠지만… 그래도 뭔가 프리가보다 못한 면이 있어선 안될 것 같다는 느낌을 받았다.

1000662651.english: - Fotia, who accepted Frigga's order without question, expressed doubt about mine.
1000662651.korean: - 프리가의 주문을 순순히 받았던 포티아는 나의 주문에는 의문을 표했다.

1000662652.english: This must be a lot, right?

1000662653.english: Are you sure you can finish it all?

1000662656.english: Five servings of pancakes with honey and fruit topping, and steak with no vegetables or sauce on the side—I'll bring them out.
1000662656.korean: 꿀과 과일을 토핑한 팬케이크랑 곁들이는 채소나 소스 없이 고기만 있는 스테이크 5인분 가져올게요.

1000662657.english: - Perhaps moved by my resolve, Fotia nodded seriously.
1000662657.korean: - 나의 의지가 전해졌는지 포티아는 진지한 얼굴로 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000662658.english: - And a little while later, Sowan personally brought the food.
1000662658.korean: - 그리고 잠시 후 소완이 직접 음식을 가져왔다.

1000662659.english: "Here are the pancakes you ordered. And…"

1000662660.english: - Sowan set the steak before me.

1000662662.english: - Two steak set meals with rice, side dishes, and sauce…

1000662663.english: I have not served Master only for a day or two.
1000662663.korean: 제가 하루 이틀 주인을 모시는 것이 아닌데 주인께서 자시는 양을 모르겠사옵니까?

1000662664.english: Do you think I don't know how much you usually eat? Surely you meant to share with Lady Frigga.

1000662666.english: And besides, eating only pancakes and meat is bad for your health, so I brought rice and side dishes as well.
1000662666.korean: 그리고 팬케이크와 고기만 자시는 것은 몸에 나쁘기에 밥과 반찬도 곁들였사옵니다.

1000662667.english: Now then, please enjoy your meal.

1000662668.english: - Before I could protest, Sowan had already disappeared into the kitchen.
1000662668.korean: - 내가 반박하기도 전에 소완은 주방으로 사라졌다.

1000662669.english: - I felt like if I called Sowan back to explain why I ordered five servings of just meat, I'd only get scolded, so I decided to eat quietly.
1000662669.korean: - 소완을 다시 불러서 내가 무슨 의도로 고기만 있는 스테이크 5인분을 주문했는지 말했다간 혼이 날 거 같아서 말없이 먹기로 했다.

1000662670.english: - As expected of Sowan—it was delicious enough to earn the phrase.
1000662670.korean: - 역시 소완이라는 말이 나올 정도로 맛있었다.

1000662671.english: Hehe, Master. You've got some sauce on the corner of your mouth.

1000662672.english: - Frigga smiled and wiped the sauce from my lips.
1000662672.korean: - 프리가는 웃으며 내 입가에 묻은 소스를 닦아주었다.

1000662673.english: - Her motherly smile and gesture shook my heart, but I managed to hold myself back.
1000662673.korean: - 모성애 넘치는 웃음과 행동에 마음이 흔들렸지만 간신히 참아냈다.

1000662676.english: At the restaurant, I was moved without realizing it by Master's kindness.
1000662676.korean: 레스토랑에서 주인님의 마음씨에 저도 모르게 감동했어요.

1000662677.english: He ordered food to match the amount I usually eat, and even thought ahead about sharing with me.
1000662677.korean: 제가 먹는 양에 맞춰서 음식을 주문하시고, 심지어 같이 나눠 먹을 것까지 생각하셨어요.

1000662678.english: And he never showed it outwardly.

1000662679.english: If it weren't for Miss Sowan, I might never have noticed.
1000662679.korean: 소완 양이 아니었다면 알아차리지도 못했을 거예요.

1000662680.english: It's embarrassing, and yet… my feelings for Master only deepen.
1000662680.korean: 부끄러운 한편… 주인님에 대한 마음이 깊어갑니다.

1000662681.english: Today's date was supposed to help me sort out my feelings toward Master…
1000662681.korean: 오늘 데이트는 저의 주인님에 대한 마음을 정리하기 위한 데이트인데…

1000662682.english: But my heart is growing in a direction I never intended.
1000662682.korean: 저의 마음은 제가 바라지 않는 방향으로 자라나고 있네요.

1000662683.english: I don't know how this date will end, but… I can't stop here.
1000662683.korean: 데이트의 결말이 어떻게 될지 모르지만… 여기서 멈출 수는 없어요.

1000662687.english: - We came to ride a boat.

1000662688.english: - Because I once saw in an old-world work a line saying that "a man should at least know how to handle one ride with style."
1000662688.korean: - 남자라면 자못 탈 것 하나는 멋지게 몰 줄 알아야 한다는 문구를 구시대의 작품에서 봤기 때문이다.

1000662689.english: - After thinking it over, I concluded that in this situation the only thing I could actually steer was a rowing boat.
1000662689.korean: - 이런저런 생각을 해봤는데 지금 상황에서 그나마 내가 몰 수 있는 것은 노를 젓는 보트뿐이라는 결론을 내렸다.

1000662690.english: - As I stepped onto the boat, the fundamental question of what "manliness" truly is kept coming back to me…
1000662690.korean: - 보트에 올라타면서 남자다움이란 무엇인가 하는 근원적인 물음이 계속해서 떠올랐지만…

1000662692.english: - Seeing Frigga and the baby bottle in her hand, I decided to deal with that later.
1000662692.korean: - 프리가와 프리가가 든 젖병을 보고 그것은 나중에 따지기로 했다.

1000662693.english: - Frigga nodded and stepped onto the boat.
1000662693.korean: - 프리가는 고개를 끄덕이고 보트에 발을 디뎠다.

1000662697.english: - The boat tipped under the shift of weight and overturned before we could do anything.
1000662697.korean: - 무게중심이 쏠린 보트는 우리가 무얼 해보기도 전에 뒤집혔다.

1000662698.english: - Having lost my balance, I fell into the water and flailed until I remembered the countermeasures I'd learned from the Nereids.
1000662698.korean: - 제대로 자세를 잡지 못한 채로 물에 빠진 나는 허우적거리다가 네레이드에게 배웠던 대처법을 떠올렸다.

1000662699.english: - Curling up, knees together, and relaxing my body.
1000662699.korean: - 몸을 웅크리고 무릎을 모은 후 몸에서 힘을 뺐다.

1000662700.english: - Slowly, my body began to float.

1000662701.english: - When I broke the surface and inhaled, I immediately searched for Frigga.
1000662701.korean: - 수면으로 떠오른 나는 숨을 들이마신 후 프리가를 찾았다.

1000662707.english: - I had forgotten I'd set this up myself…

1000662708.english: - Embarrassed from floundering alone, I took Frigga's hand and led us back to the shore.
1000662708.korean: - 혼자 허우적거린 게 부끄러워져서 프리가의 손을 잡고 물가로 향했다.

1000662710.english: - It wasn't baby play, but still…

1000662713.english: Because of me, Master and I ended up falling into the water together.
1000662713.korean: 저 때문에 주인님과 함께 물에 빠지고 말았어요.

1000662714.english: But even right after falling in, Master's first concern was to look for me.
1000662714.korean: 하지만 주인님께서는 물에 빠지시고 난 직후에도 제일 먼저 저를 찾으셨답니다.

1000662715.english: Instead of scolding me, Master worried about me.
1000662715.korean: 주인님께선 저를 타박하시는 대신 저를 걱정해 주셨어요.

1000662716.english: And he even comforted me, saying this was something we could just laugh off…
1000662716.korean: 그리고 이번 일은 그냥 웃어넘길 수 있는 일이라고 위로까지…

1000662718.english: I realized that my heart had reached a point of no return.
1000662718.korean: 저는 제 마음이 돌이킬 수 없는 단계에 접어들었음을 알게 되었어요.

1000662719.english: Master is no longer just someone to protect, to guard, or to care for.
1000662719.korean: 저에게 주인님은 더 이상 보호의 대상, 호위의 대상, 돌봐줘야 할 대상이 아니게 되었어요.

1000662721.english: - My plan to show off my manliness all day ended in complete failure.
1000662721.korean: - 하루 종일 나의 남자다움을 어필한다는 계획은 완벽하게 실패했다.

1000662723.english: - Frigga was standing At my side.

1000662724.english: - And even while changing clothes, she had still made sure to keep that baby bottle in her hand…
1000662724.korean: - 그리고 옷을 갈아입은 와중에도 챙긴, 프리가가 들고 있는 젖병도…

1000662725.english: - I guess I won't escape the clutches of that terrifying weapon of social ruin…
1000662725.korean: - 저 무시무시한 사회적말살 병기의 마수를 벗어나지 못하게 되었구나…

1000662726.english: - It was an honor to be with you, my majesty.
1000662726.korean: - 당신과 함께 여서 영광이었습니다, 내 위엄이시여.

1000662727.english: - …Though, come to think of it, it didn't really feel all that majestic…
1000662727.korean: - …사실 생각해 보니 크게 위엄 있는 것 같지는 않았지만…

1000662730.english: - Frigga hesitated a little, then opened her arms.

1000662733.english: - But even if I lose my majesty, I will not become addicted to baby play—for the sake of diverse play if nothing else!
1000662733.korean: - 하지만 위엄은 잃을지언정 다채로운 플레이를 위해서라도 유아플레이에는 중독되지 않을 것이다!

1000662734.english: - As I steeled myself… I realized something.
1000662734.korean: - 각오를 다지고 있을 때… 나는 무언가를 알아차렸다.

1000662735.english: - Frigga hadn't said, "I will hold you," but rather, "Please hold me."

1000662736.english: - They seem the same, but they are different.

1000662737.english: - Holding onto that hope, I embraced Frigga.
1000662737.korean: - 거기에 희망을 가지고 나는 프리가를 안았다.

1000662739.english: - Frigga's body in my arms was startlingly cold.
1000662739.korean: - 끌어안은 프리가의 몸은 놀라울 정도로 차가웠다.

1000662741.english: - Of the Orca members, Frigga's size alone would rank among the top five, yet now she felt terribly fragile.
1000662741.korean: - 오르카 대원 중에서 덩치만 보자면 다섯 손가락에 들어가는 프리가가 지금은 무척이나 가녀리게 느껴졌다.

1000662745.english: - After a long silence, Frigga swallowed something down and continued.
1000662745.korean: - 프리가는 한참을 침묵하다가 무언가를 꿀꺽 삼키고 말을 이었다.

1000662746.english: "Master, you are so very precious to me.

1000662747.english: You are someone I must protect, care for, and cherish.
1000662747.korean: 보호의 대상이기도 하고, 돌보고 아껴야 할 분이시죠.

1000662748.english: That alone should have been enough…

1000662750.english: But at some point, that alone stopped being enough.

1000662751.english: My eyes always chase you, my heart always turns toward you.
1000662751.korean: 저의 눈은 언제나 주인님을 쫓고, 저의 마음은 언제나 주인님께 향해 있어요.

1000662752.english: Ever since I began to feel strange, I haven't been able to properly perform my duties.
1000662752.korean: 제가 이상해지고 난 다음부터 저는 임무를 제대로 수행하지 못하게 되었어요.

1000662753.english: I knew what this feeling was… and yet pretended not to.
1000662753.korean: 이 마음이 무엇인지... 알면서도... 애써 모른 척했어요.

1000662754.english: And so… my heart grew beyond my control.
1000662754.korean: 그랬더니... 제 마음은 이미 제가 어떻게 할 수 없을 정도로 자라있었어요.

1000662755.english: I thought today's date would help me settle these feelings…
1000662755.korean: 오늘 데이트로 이 마음을 정리하려고 했는데...

1000662756.english: But that resolve was self-deception from the start.

1000662757.english: Being on this date with you only made my feelings surge uncontrollably until I ended up like this."
1000662757.korean: 주인님과의 데이트를 하면서 제 마음은 겉잡을 수 없이 격렬해져 이렇게 되어버렸어요.

1000662758.english: - After a rough breath, Frigga laid her heart bare.
1000662758.korean: - 프리가는 거친 심호흡 후에 자신의 마음을 내보였다.

1000662762.english: Before… it was enough just to be by your side…

1000662763.english: To guard you… to care for you… that was enough…
1000662763.korean: 주인님을 호위하고… 돌볼 수 있으면 됐는데…

1000662764.english: But now… it's not enough… I've come to want more.
1000662764.korean: 지금은… 그것만으로는… 그 이상을 바라게 되었어요.

1000662765.english: As much as I love you… I want to be loved by you in return.
1000662765.korean: 주인님을 사랑하는 만큼… 주인님께 사랑받고 싶어요.

1000662770.english: - the same Frigga who had stood so firm on the frontlines, blocking enemy attacks, was crying.
1000662770.korean: - 최전방에서 듬직하게 적의 공격을 받아내는 프리가가 울고 있었다.

1000662771.english: - Crying because she was sorry for loving me.

1000662772.english: - Crying because she wanted to be loved by me.

1000662774.english: - Only belatedly did I realize how cruel I had been to Frigga today.
1000662774.korean: - 뒤늦게 나는 오늘 프리가에게 얼마나 잔인한 짓을 했는지 깨달았다.

1000662775.english: - I had cut down her heart to fit my own convenience, and acted as I pleased on top of it.
1000662775.korean: - 프리가의 마음을 멋대로 재단하고, 거기에 맞춰서 나 좋을 대로 행동했다.

1000662776.english: - while Frigga was seriously troubled, I was agonizing over something utterly ridiculous.
1000662776.korean: - 프리가가 진지하게 고민하고 있을 때, 나는 웃기지도 않은 고민을 하고 있었다.

1000662777.english: - I didn't know what it meant to be manly, but the things I had done today were anything but manly.
1000662777.korean: - 남자다운 게 무엇인지 모르겠지만, 오늘 내가 저지른 짓들은 결코 남자다운 행동이 아니었다.

1000662778.english: - No, chasing after the illusion of manliness had blinded me to the heart of someone precious.
1000662778.korean: - 아니, 남자다움이라는 허상을 쫓느라 소중한 사람의 마음을 보지 못했다.

1000662779.english: - There was only one thing I could do now.
1000662779.korean: - 지금 내가 해야 할 행동은 하나뿐겠지.

1000662780.english: - To return Frigga's feelings with my own heart.
1000662780.korean: - 프리가의 마음에 내 마음으로 돌려주는 것.

1000662781.english: - Not a lie for the sake of comfort, but my true sincerity.
1000662781.korean: - 위로하기 위한 거짓이 아닌 나의 진심.

1000662784.english: - A kiss more certain than a thousand words.

1000662785.english: - Long enough to leave no doubt as my answer.

1000662786.english: - Only after Frigga's trembling had subsided did the kiss finally end.
1000662786.korean: - 프리가의 떨림이 잦아들고도 한참 후에 입맞춤이 끝났다.

1000662788.english: - Though tear streaks still remained, there was no sadness left.
1000662788.korean: - 프리가의 얼굴에는 아직 눈물자국이 남아있었지만 슬픔은 더 이상 남아있지 않았다.

1000662790.english: Thank you. For allowing me to love you…
1000662790.korean: 감사해요. 제가 주인님을 사랑하는 것을 허락해 주셔서…

1000662792.english: Now that I know love with you, I've realized that my wish to protect you, care for you, and love you aren't separate feelings.
1000662792.korean: 주인님과의 사랑을 알게 되니 제가 주인님을 보호하고 싶고, 돌보고 싶고, 사랑하고 싶은 마음이 별개의 것이 아님을 알게 되었어요.

1000662793.english: And… that this is the greatest expression of affection I can give…
1000662793.korean: 저… 그래서… 제가 할 수 있는 최고의 애정표현이 이것이라는 것도…

1000662795.english: - But then she glanced at the bottle in her hand and lifted it slightly.
1000662795.korean: - 그러나 프리가는 손에 들고 있는 젖병을 곁눈질하고 슬쩍 들어 보였다.

1000662797.english: - I still don't know what manliness really is.

1000662798.english: - Nor whether it is good or bad.
1000662798.korean: - 그것이 좋은 것인지, 나쁜 것인지도 모르겠다.

1000662799.english: - But if striving for manliness means something good…
1000662799.korean: - 그러나 만약 좋은 의미로 남자다움을 추구한다면…

1000662800.english: - Then it must mean having the resolve to fulfill the wishes of the woman you love, who loves you in return.
1000662800.korean: - 자신이 좋아하고, 자신을 좋아해주는 여자가 바라는 것을 이루어 줄 각오가 있어야 할 것이다.

1000662801.english: - No—calling it "resolve" makes it sound like what she wants is wrong, so let me rephrase.
1000662801.korean: - 아니, 각오라고 말하니 상대가 원하는 것이 나쁜 것이라는 느낌이니 정정한다.

1000662802.english: - It means knowing how to enjoy it.

1000662803.english: - Thinking back, that one line might have been the manliest thing I've said today.
1000662803.korean: - 생각건대. 이 한 마디가 내가 오늘 한 행동 중 가장 남자다웠으리라.

1000662804.english: - While making my rounds of the base…

1000662805.english: Elven Milk here! Healthy and delicious Elven Milk!
1000662805.korean: 엘븐 밀크 있어요. 몸에 좋고 맛도 있는 엘븐 밀크 있어요.

1000662806.english: Drink Elven Milk and gain a strong and sturdy body!
1000662806.korean: 모두 엘븐 밀크 마시고 건강하고 튼튼한 몸을 가져봐요.

1000662807.english: - I saw Frigga promoting Elven Milk.
1000662807.korean: - 엘븐 밀크 판촉 활동을 하는 프리가가 보였다.

1000662808.english: - For reasons unknown, her promotions were very effective, and the stock vanished in no time.
1000662808.korean: - 이유는 알 수 없지만 프리가의 판촉 활동은 무척 효과적인지 엘븐 밀크 재고가 순식간에 줄어들었다.

1000662810.english: - And for some reason, Poi seemed wary of Frigga yet still accepted the Elven Milk.
1000662810.korean: - 그리고 왠지 포이가 프리가를 경계하면서도 엘븐 밀크를 받아가는 것도 보였다.

1000662812.english: Thanks to everyone's support, we're sold out! Thank you, everyone!
1000662812.korean: 여러분의 성원에 힘입어 완판되었어요. 감사해요, 여러분.

1000662813.english: - As Frigga wrapped up her promotion, some younger-looking members approached.
1000662813.korean: - 프리가가 판촉 활동을 끝내고 뒷정리를 하던 중 어린 체형의 대원들이 찾아왔다.

1000662814.english: - When they looked disappointed that it was over, Frigga thought for a moment and then said—
1000662814.korean: - 판촉 활동이 끝난 것을 안 대원들이 실망하자 프리가는 잠시 생각하다가…

1000662818.english: Fortunately, I had saved some Elven Milk for myself.
1000662818.korean: 다행히 제가 마시려고 남겨 둔 엘븐 밀크가 있었네요.

1000662819.english: - The younger members gratefully drank the Elven Milk.
1000662819.korean: - 어린 대원들이 감사 인사를 하며 엘븐 밀크를 마셨다.

1000662821.english: - Frigga smiled tenderly and hugged them close.

1000662822.english: - After the members had left and she was tidying up again, I approached Frigga.
1000662822.korean: - 대원들이 전부 떠나고 다시 뒷정리를 하는 프리가에게 다가갔다.

1000662824.english: Oh, no, it's fine. I can handle this all by myself.
1000662824.korean: 아, 아니에요. 저 혼자 다 할 수 있어요.

1000662826.english: - After quickly finishing the cleanup, I sat on a bench to rest.
1000662826.korean: - 빠르게 뒷정리를 마친 후 벤치에 앉아서 쉬었다.

1000662827.english: - In truth, her recent work performance had been exceptional.
1000662827.korean: - 실제로 최근 그녀의 업무성과는 무척이나 뛰어났다.

1000662831.english: - At my words, Frigga thought for a moment, then glanced around.
1000662831.korean: - 내 말에 프리가는 잠시 생각하다가 주위를 살폈다.

1000662832.english: - After confirming no one was nearby, she spoke.
1000662832.korean: - 주위에 아무도 없는 것을 확인한 프리가가 말했다.

1000662834.english: - Not "let me hold you," but "hold me."

1000662835.english: - That subtle difference was a big one.
1000662835.korean: - 이 차이는 사소해 보이지만 큰 차이가 있었다.

1000662837.english: Happiness isn't just in holding someone, but also in being held by someone.
1000662837.korean: 누군가를 안아주는 것도 행복하지만 누군가가 저를 안아주는 것도 행복하네요.

1000662838.english: - Outwardly, it might not have looked very different, but the feelings she held were surely different.
1000662838.korean: - 겉보기에는 평소와 크게 달라 보이지 않겠지만 그녀가 느끼는 감정은 다를 것이다.

1000662840.english: May I… act spoiled with you?

1000662841.english: - The same woman who always showed motherly affection to others and accepted their neediness was now being needy with me.
1000662841.korean: - 다른 사람들 앞에서는 모성애 넘치는 모습을 보여주고, 다른 사람들의 어리광을 받아주던 그녀가 나에게 어리광을 부리고 있었다.

1000662842.english: - I couldn't put into words how lovely that was.

1000662843.english: - No, whether she showed this side of herself or not, she was always lovely.
1000662843.korean: - 아니, 이 모습을 보여주든 아니든 그녀는 원래 사랑스러웠다.

1000662845.english: - Frigga confessed while clinging to me in spoiled affection.
1000662845.korean: - 프리가는 나에게 안긴 채 어리광을 부리며 고백했다.

1000662846.english: - Her confession carried no trace of hesitation anymore.
1000662846.korean: - 프리가의 고백에선 더 이상 어떠한 미혹도 존재하지 않았다.

1000662849.english: I heard you went on a date with the Commander this time.

1000662850.english: First off, congratulations. Not just as superior and subordinate in Doom Bringer, but also personally.
1000662850.korean: 우선 축하해. 둠 브링어의 상관과 부하로서뿐만 아니라 개인적인 친분으로서도.

1000662851.english: If you need anything, say the word. I'll use my authority to support you however I can.
1000662851.korean: 필요한 게 있으면 얼마든지 말해. 내 권한을 이용해서 최대한 지원할 테니까.

1000662852.english: And if you want to know how I captured the Commander's heart, I'll teach you anytime.
1000662852.korean: 혹시 내가 사령관의 마음을 어떻게 사로잡았는지 알고 싶다면 얼마든지 가르쳐 줄게.

1000662853.english: Coming from someone who endured three long years, the weight of that statement is something else.
1000662853.korean: 장장 3년간 인고의 시간을 보낸 사람이 하는 말이라 그 무게가 남다르네요.

1000662855.english: Fufu, then let perfect me teach you the way to conquer the Commander.
1000662855.korean: 후후, 그러면 완벽한 제가 사령관님을 함락하는 방법을 알려드리죠.

1000662857.english: Shut it, you. Just thinking about it pisses me off again.
1000662857.korean: 댁은 닥쳐요, 좀. 다시 생각하니 또 빡치네.

1000662858.english: W-what? Did you just tell your older sister to shut up?!

1000662859.english: Do you know how despairing it felt to finally cross one mountain only to find another? If not for the collective madness during the Reverse Bunny incident…"
1000662859.korean: 간신히 산 하나를 넘기니 또다시 산이 있는 것을 알았을 때 제가 얼마나 절망했는지 아세요? 역바니 소동 때 분위기에 휩쓸려서 단체로 하지 않았으면…

1000662860.english: But for you, there are no mountains—only plains.

1000662861.english: Oh… I may have been the first to hurl an insult, but you're the one who broke our agreement not to comment on each other's bodies. Personal attack noted.
1000662861.korean: 호오… 욕은 제가 먼저 했지만 ‘서로의 신체에 대해서 논하지 않는다’는 협약을 위반하는 인신공격은 그쪽이 먼저 했네요?

1000662862.english: Shall we trigger mutual assured destruction?

1000662864.english: If you spill coffee on the commander's pants... you can make him take them off...
1000662864.korean: 커피를 사령관 바지에 뿜으면… 벗길 수 있다…

1000662866.english: Wait, how can you just say something like that and then leave?!
1000662866.korean: 아니, 그런 소리를 하고 그냥 사라지면 어쩌자는 건데…

1000662868.english: If you show a cute side, the Commander will like it. Nyan.
1000662868.korean: 귀여운 모습을 보여주면 사령관님이 좋아하십니다. 냥.

1000662869.english: Hear that? Ultra cute me has entered the stage!
1000662869.korean: 귀엽다는 말에 초 귀여운 나 등장!

1000662870.english: What's this? You need dating advice? Then it's time for successful me to step in.
1000662870.korean: 뭐야? 데이트 조언이 필요해? 그러면 잘 나가는 내가 나서야겠네.

1000662871.english: The most important thing on a date is…

1000662873.english: If you eat something delicious, everything will work out.

1000662874.english: My recommendations: steak, waffles, sushi, honey bread, tornado potatoes, tteokbokki, cheese balls, strawberry shortcake, tiramisu, gukbap, set meals…
1000662874.korean: 제가 추천하는 것은 스테이크, 와플, 초밥, 허니브레드, 회오리감자, 떡볶이, 치즈볼, 딸기 쇼트케이크, 티라미수, 국밥, 백반정식…

1000662875.english: That's just your own food wishlist…
1000662875.korean: 아니, 그건 그냥 네가 먹고 싶은 거잖아…

1000662876.english: I want to try Schweinshaxe. Meow.

1000662877.english: Kuhk! Don't put me to the test!
1000662877.korean: 큭! 저를 시험에 들게 하지 마세요!

1000662878.english: I barely made it to half of my target weight!

1000662884.english: We gathered to help Daika, but if everyone just rambles saying their own piece, what are we doing!
1000662884.korean: 다이카를 도와주려고 모였으면서 지리멸렬하게 모두 자기 할 말만 하면 어쩌자는 거야!

1000662886.english: I can't tell you how much everyone's advice and encouragement means to me...
1000662886.korean: 모두의 충고와 응원이... 저에게 얼마나 큰지 몰라요.

1000662887.english: With the strength of your advice and encouragement… I'll do my best to succeed at this date.
1000662887.korean: 여러분의 충고와 응원에 힘입어… 이번 데이트 최선을 다해서 성공시킬게요.

1000662888.english: For the date preparations… I'll take my leave first.
1000662888.korean: 저는 데이트 준비를 위해… 먼저 일어나겠어요.

1000662889.english: May you all be at peace…

1000662890.english: - When I arrived at the date spot, Daika was sitting on a bench with a large bag beside her.
1000662890.korean: - 데이트 장소에 가니 다이카가 커다란 짐을 옆에 두고 벤치에 앉아있었다.

1000662891.english: - Feeling mischievous, I silenced my footsteps, approached Daika, and sat beside her.
1000662891.korean: - 장난기가 동해서 발소리를 죽이고 다이카에게 다가가 그 옆에 앉았다.

1000662893.english: - I quietly reached out and held Daika's hand.
1000662893.korean: - 슬그머니 손을 뻗어 다이카의 손을 잡았다.

1000662895.english: - Daika opened her eyes and looked this way.

1000662897.english: I was listening to the sounds.

1000662898.english: They say "seeing once is better than hearing a hundred times"… but right now, "hearing once is better than hearing a hundred times."

1000662899.english: Would you like to listen together?

1000662900.english: - Following Daika's words, I held her hand, closed my eyes, and listened.
1000662900.korean: - 다이카의 말에 따라, 다이카와 손을 잡고 눈을 감았다. 그리고 소리를 들었다.

1000662901.english: - I heard the rustling of trees swayed by the wind made by the ventilators and air units.
1000662901.korean: - 환풍기와 공조기가 만들어낸 바람에 수풀이 흔들리는 소리가 들렸다.

1000662902.english: - And I heard the voices of the members.

1000662903.english: - The sound of construction, the cries of street vendors, people talking, footsteps walking and running, songs, and laughter.
1000662903.korean: - 공사하는 소리, 노점에서 호객하는 소리, 이야기하는 소리, 걷고 뛰는 소리, 노랫소리 그리고 웃는 소리.

1000662905.english: The world used to be… much more desolate than this.

1000662906.english: The only sounds we heard sometimes… were explosions from battles.
1000662906.korean: 어쩌다가 들리는 소리도… 전투 때문에 생기는 폭음들뿐.

1000662907.english: Between battles… even conversations with comrades were mostly about fighting… or survival.
1000662907.korean: 전투와 전투 사이에서… 동료들과 하는 대화도 전투와 관련되거나… 생존과 관련된 것이 대부분이었어요.

1000662908.english: A life where only fighting and surviving mattered...

1000662911.english: - Even just listening to the sounds around us, Daika looked truly happy.
1000662911.korean: - 단지 주변에서 들려오는 소리를 듣는 것뿐인데도 다이카는 무척이나 행복해했다.

1000662912.english: It may only be temporary peace… but in the past, we couldn't even hope for things like this.
1000662912.korean: 일시적인 평화이긴 하지만… 옛날에는 이런 것을 바라지도 못했죠.

1000662913.english: All of this is thanks to a certain someone.
1000662913.korean: 이 모든 게 어떤 분이 계신 덕분이에요.

1000662914.english: - I opened my eyes and looked beside me; Daika was gazing at me.
1000662914.korean: - 눈을 뜨고 옆을 보니 다이카가 나를 바라보고 있었다.

1000662915.english: - Receiving the affectionate gaze of a woman who found happiness in small things, I felt embarrassed and slightly averted my eyes and changed the topic.
1000662915.korean: - 소소한 것에서 행복을 느끼는 여성의 애정이 가득한 눈길을 받으니 나는 멋쩍어져서 살짝 시선과 화제를 돌렸다.

1000662916.english: With the lunchbox I prepared and dessert… there are also snacks.
1000662916.korean: 제가 준비한 점심 도시락과 후식으로… 먹을 다과랍니다.

1000662917.english: - I looked again at Daika's bag.

1000662918.english: - Just at a glance, its volume was considerable. I didn't know how heavy it was, but carrying that around all the time must be cumbersome.
1000662918.korean: - 척 봐도 부피가 상당하다. 얼마나 무거울지는 모르겠지만 저걸 계속 들고 다니면 거추장스럽겠지.

1000662920.english: - I told a small lie and had an early lunch.
1000662920.korean: - 가벼운 거짓말을 하고 이른 점심을 먹었다.

1000662921.english: - The lunchbox Daika prepared was very abundant. Not just in quantity, but in variety.
1000662921.korean: - 다이카가 준비한 도시락은 무척이나 풍성했다. 단순히 양이 많은 게 아니라 종류가 많았다.

1000662923.english: - Back when we proposed improvements to the mess, I once suggested fried eggs instead of steamed eggs, but after receiving an anonymous report I learned that making every single dish was a job in itself.
1000662923.korean: - 옛날 급양 개선 때 계란찜 말고 계란프라이는 어떠냐고 의견 제시했다가 무기명 투서를 받은 이후로 음식 하나하나 만드는 게 전부 일이라는 것을 배웠다.

1000662924.english: - It was clear Daika had spent a long time preparing this lunchbox as well.
1000662924.korean: - 다이카가 준비한 도시락도 오랜 시간 준비했을 것이 분명했다.

1000662925.english: - I ate the lunchbox Daika had prepared.

1000662927.english: - Thanks to Sowan, I've eaten many delicious things, yet Daika's cooking was plenty delicious even to me.
1000662927.korean: - 소완 덕분에 맛있는 것을 많이 먹어본 나에게도 다이카의 요리는 충분히 맛있었다.

1000662928.english: - I forgot it was an early lunch and emptied the lunchbox in no time.
1000662928.korean: - 이른 점심이라는 것도 잊고 순식간에 도시락을 비웠다.

1000662930.english: Shall I pour you some tea? Warm, or cold. Which would you prefer?
1000662930.korean: 차를 한잔 드릴까요? 따뜻한 것과, 차가운 것. 어떤 걸 원하시나요?

1000662931.english: - Daika took out a teapot set and brewed tea.

1000662932.english: - The way she brewed it was so neat and orderly, it looked almost like a form of art.
1000662932.korean: - 차를 우리는 모습이 무척이나 정갈해서 마치 일종의 예술을 보는 거 같았다.

1000662934.english: - I grew nervous, feeling like I had to mind my manners, but seeing me like that, Daika gently smiled and said:
1000662934.korean: - 무언가 예의를 차려야 할 것 같아서 초조해졌지만, 그런 내 모습을 본 다이카가 살포시 웃으며 말했다.

1000662935.english: Fufu, don't worry about being formal… just drink comfortably, Commander.
1000662935.korean: 후후, 예의 차리려고 하지 마시고… 편하게 마시시면 돼요, 사령관님.

1000662936.english: - Following Daika's words, I drank the tea and ate the snacks.
1000662936.korean: - 다이카의 말에 따라 차를 마시고 과자를 먹었다.

1000662937.english: - The treats, like the lunchbox, were delicious as well.

1000662938.english: Hearing you praise me like that… I don't know where to put myself.
1000662938.korean: 그렇게 칭찬해 주시니… 몸 둘 바를 모르겠네요.

1000662939.english: - Daika turned her gaze away, her face flushed, but she looked truly happy.
1000662939.korean: - 다이카는 얼굴을 붉히며 시선을 돌렸지만, 무척이나 기뻐 보였다.

1000662940.english: - All day during this date, I felt a sense of incongruity.

1000662941.english: - Not the same kind of incongruity I felt back in Paradise.
1000662941.korean: - 옛날 낙원에서 느꼈던 그런 위화감은 아니다.

1000662942.english: - This was on a much smaller scale, less dangerous, and more realistic.
1000662942.korean: - 그것보다는 훨씬 스케일이 작고, 덜 위험하고, 현실적인 위화감이었다.

1000662946.english: - Wherever we went, people would marvel at how good we looked together, or give us some extra "couple service," or by sheer timing some accidental physical contact would happen.
1000662946.korean: - 어디를 가도 우리 사이가 참 좋아 보인다고 감탄하거나, 커플 서비스라고 무언가를 덤으로 주거나, 타이밍이 좋게 신체접촉을 하는 사고가 일어나는 등.

1000662947.english: - All throughout the date, I could clearly feel that someone's will was involved.
1000662947.korean: - 데이트 내내 누군가의 의지가 관여된 게 확실하게 느껴지는 일이 많이 일어났다.

1000662951.english: - Her expression seemed indifferent… but her body was trembling.
1000662951.korean: - 표정은 무덤덤해 보였지만… 그녀의 몸은 떨리고 있었다.

1000662952.english: I'm sorry… for deceiving you, Commander…

1000662953.english: ……Because I like you… isn't a proper answer… is it?
1000662953.korean: ……좋아하니까요… 라는 말은 제대로 된 답이… 아니겠죠?

1000662954.english: - Daika took a deep breath and began to speak.

1000662956.english: You must know yourself and your opponent… know propriety and methods… know timing and circumstances… know when to wait and when to act.
1000662956.korean: 상대와 나를 알고… 도리와 방법을 알고… 때와 환경을 알고… 기다릴 때와 나서야 할 때를… 알아야 하죠.

1000662957.english: If even one thing is out of place, you won't achieve results… you'll only face failure…
1000662957.korean: 하나라도 어그러지면 성과를 내기는커녕… 실패를 겪게 되죠…

1000662958.english: I've known this for a long time…

1000662959.english: But watching Captain Mei and Colonel Night Angel, I became convinced.
1000662959.korean: 메이 대장님과 나이트앤젤 대령님을 보면서 확신하게 되었죠.

1000662961.english: So I made the most of this opportunity I was given.
1000662961.korean: 그래서 얻게 된 이번 기회를… 최대한 이용했어요.

1000662962.english: Simply grooming my looks and showing off my strengths wasn't enough.
1000662962.korean: 단순히 제 외모를 가꾸고, 저의 장점을 어필하는 것만으로는 부족했어요.

1000662963.english: There are many who are better than me.

1000662964.english: So I decided to… use another method.

1000662965.english: Third parties… I met people… and asked them.

1000662966.english: To tell you that we looked good together… to help create a good atmosphere…
1000662966.korean: 사령관님과 제가 잘 어울린다고 말해달라고... 좋은 분위기를 만들어 달라고...

1000662967.english: To create situations where I could show my charms.
1000662967.korean: 제 매력을 보여줄 수 있는 상황을... 만들어 달라고.

1000662968.english: If, during the whole date, Commander… you kept hearing from others that we suit each other… if you felt the good mood… then I thought you'd come to love me…
1000662968.korean: 사령관님께서 저와 데이트를 하는 내내… 좋은 분위기에서... 제삼자에게 잘 어울린다는 말을 들으시면… 저를 사랑해 주실 거라 생각해서…

1000662969.english: I'm sorry… Did it displease you? That I committed such a sly deed…
1000662969.korean: 죄송해요… 불쾌하셨죠? 이런 간사한 짓을 저지르다니…

1000662970.english: That a Bioroid would dare to do this to a human…

1000662972.english: - To Daika's question, I gave my answer.

1000662975.english: - While Daika was frozen from the kiss, I said:
1000662975.korean: - 다이카가 키스로 굳어있을 때, 나는 말했다.

1000662976.english: - Daika's face flushed once she belatedly realized my kiss.
1000662976.korean: - 뒤늦게 나의 키스를 인지한 다이카의 얼굴이 붉어졌다.

1000662977.english: - Perhaps thanks to the shock of the kiss, her trembling had already ceased.
1000662977.korean: - 입맞춤의 충격 덕분인지 다이카의 몸도 어느새 떨림이 그쳐 있었다.

1000662982.english: Loyalty to Captain Mei… and Colonel Night Angel…
1000662982.korean: 메이 대장님과… 나이트앤젤 대령님에 대한 의리…

1000662983.english: To the two who long suffered, unable to receive your love, Commander…
1000662983.korean: 오랫동안 사령관님께... 사랑을 받지 못해... 괴로워하던 두 사람에 대한...

1000662984.english: - Guilt welled up in me, for I too bore responsibility for their long suffering.
1000662984.korean: - 두 사람이 오랫동안 고통받은 것에 내 책임도 있었기에 죄책감이 생겼다.

1000662985.english: - And while those two suffered, yet another person also suffered.
1000662985.korean: - 그리고 두 사람이 고통받는 동안 또 다른 한 사람도 고통받고 있었다.

1000662986.english: When at last those two… came to share love with you, Commander… I cannot express how happy I was…
1000662986.korean: 두 사람이 마침내… 사령관님과 사랑을 나누게 되었을 때… 얼마나 기뻤는지 몰라요…

1000662987.english: Respected and dependable comrades… had finally fulfilled their wish and found happiness.
1000662987.korean: 존경스럽고 믿음직한 전우들이… 마침내 소원을 이루고 행복해졌으니까요.

1000662988.english: And… beyond that, there was something that made me even happier…
1000662988.korean: 그리고… 그 이상으로 저를 기쁘게 하는 게... 있었어요.

1000662989.english: That I could finally convey my heart… to you, Commander.
1000662989.korean: 사령관님께 제 마음을... 전할 수 있게 된 것이요.

1000662990.english: - Daika took a deep breath, then slowly and carefully entrusted her heart to me.
1000662990.korean: - 다이카는 심호흡을 하고 천천히, 조심스럽게 자신의 마음을 나에게 전했다.

1000662993.english: Since the very first time we met…

1000662995.english: - I had no words within me that could equal the weight of the confession Daika had carried in her heart for so long.
1000662995.korean: - 다이카가 오랫동안 가슴에 품어온 고백에 견줄 수 있는 단어는 내 안에 없었다.

1000662998.english: I will quietly… cover for you… so please… with all your heart…
1000662998.korean: 슬쩍… 가려 드릴 테니… 부디... 마음껏…

1000662999.english: - I embraced Daika and kissed her lips.

1000663000.english: - And this time, Daika responded eagerly, without hesitation, to my answer.
1000663000.korean: - 다이카도 이제는 거리낌 없이 적극적으로 나의 응답에 답했다.

1000663001.english: - And when mere embraces and kisses no longer sufficed to convey our hearts, we went to my room and unraveled the knots within us.
1000663001.korean: - 그리고 포옹과 입맞춤으로는 서로에게 마음을 전하기 힘든 지경이 되자 우리는 내 방으로 가서 응어리진 마음을 풀어냈다.

1000663002.english: Um… Colonel Daika… are you here?

1000663005.english: H-how was your date with the Commander?

1000663006.english: Fufu. It will be a long story… is that alright?

1000663007.english: Please, have a seat… I'll brew some tea.

1000663009.english: Wouldn't a full-course snack session be better?

1000663011.english: If it's the Commander… he would be pleased no matter what we do.
1000663011.korean: 사령관님이시라면… 저희들이 무얼 하든 기뻐해 주실 테니까요.

1000663012.english: But what matters most… is knowing what will make the other happy, too.
1000663012.korean: 하지만 중요한 건… 상대도 기뻐할 것을 아는 거겠죠?

1000663013.english: Does that mean… finding out what food the Commander likes?

1000663014.english: That's one way to see it…

1000663016.english: Meeting the Commander with only a cute appearance doesn't seem enough. Nyan.
1000663016.korean: 귀여운 모습으로 사령관님을 만나는 것으로는 부족해 보입니다. 냥.

1000663017.english: Fufu, you're already plenty pretty… and cute.

1000663018.english: I don't know what more I should do. Nyan.
1000663018.korean: 제가 뭘 더 해야 할지 모르겠습니다. 냥.

1000663020.english: But this… keep it firmly in mind.

1000663022.english: You must know yourself and your partner… know propriety and methods… know timing and circumstances… know when to wait and when to act.
1000663022.korean: 상대와 나를 알고… 도리와 방법을 알고… 때와 환경을 알고… 기다릴 때와 나서야 할 때를… 알아야 해요.

1000663024.english: - Basking in the cool breeze, we arrived at the fountain in the center of the plaza.
1000663024.korean: - 선선한 바람을 맞으며 광장 중앙의 분수대에 도착했다.

1000663025.english: - A sight that had by now become familiar to my eyes.

1000663026.english: - As I looked around to see if today's date partner had arrived, I saw no one, and just as I was about to sit on a bench to wait,
1000663026.korean: - 오늘의 데이트 상대가 왔는지 둘러봐도 보이지 않아 벤치에 앉아서 기다리려는 순간,

1000663028.english: - With a playful voice, my vision went dark.
1000663028.korean: - 장난기 담긴 목소리와 함께 눈앞이 캄캄해졌다.

1000663029.english: - I knew who it was from the voice alone, but giving the answer right away wouldn't be fun.
1000663029.korean: - 목소리만 듣고 누군지 알았지만, 바로 정답을 말하면 재미없겠지.

1000663031.english: - I tickled the other's hand with my finger.

1000663033.english: - Stroking a finger with my index finger, I felt a faint tremble.
1000663033.korean: - 집게손가락으로 손가락을 어루만지자, 미세한 떨림이 느껴진다.

1000663036.english: - Just as I was about to grab her pinky finger and bring it to my mouth, the palm covering my eyes lifted away.
1000663036.korean: - 새끼손가락을 잡아 입에 가져가려는 순간, 눈을 가리고 있던 손바닥이 걷혔다.

1000663037.english: You were about to put my finger in your mouth, weren't you.
1000663037.korean: 지금 내 손가락 입에 넣으려고 했지.

1000663038.english: Don't think of brushing it off.

1000663039.english: Time and place matter. What if you do that even outside?
1000663039.korean: 시간과 장소를 가려야지, 밖에서까지 그러면 어떡해?

1000663041.english: I don't know, I'll think about it when the time comes.

1000663044.english: That thing I asked for, remember? To come without dressing up.
1000663044.korean: 내가 부탁한 거 있잖아. 꾸미지 않고 나와달라고 한 거.

1000663045.english: You really did as I said? You look just the same as on a day off.

1000663046.english: - The date plan Bulgalsari submitted had one key difference from the others.
1000663046.korean: - 불가사리가 제출한 데이트 계획안은 남들과 다른 점이 있었다.

1000663047.english: - Namely, the request to show up completely unadorned.
1000663047.korean: - 바로, 조금도 꾸미지 않은 상태로 나와달라는 것.

1000663048.english: - Right now, my hair was simply dried as it was, and I was wearing a plain shirt and pants.
1000663048.korean: - 지금의 나는 아무렇게나 머리를 말린 채 특색 없는 셔츠와 바지를 입은 상태였다.

1000663049.english: Right, untouched by anyone else's hands.
1000663049.korean: 맞아, 다른 사람의 손이 닿지 않은 그 상태.

1000663050.english: That way, it'll be more worthwhile for me to dress you up in my taste later.
1000663050.korean: 그래야 내 취향대로 꾸밀 보람이 생기니까.

1000663052.english: Not bad. Just asking to be sure, you don't avoid any foods, right?
1000663052.korean: 나쁘지 않네. 혹시나 해서 묻는 건데 가리는 음식 같은 건 없지?

1000663053.english: Let's just have a light brunch at a café.

1000663054.english: - Just as I was about to move to our destination, Bulgalsari grabbed my sleeve.
1000663054.korean: - 목적지를 듣고 움직이려는 순간, 불가사리가 내 소매를 붙잡았다.

1000663056.english: When walking together, you're supposed to hold hands. What are you doing? My arm hurts.
1000663056.korean: 같이 걸을 때는 손 잡고 걸어야지. 뭐해? 나 팔 아파.

1000663057.english: Hurry up and hold my hand.

1000663058.english: - I took the hand Bulgalsari extended with a mischievous smile.
1000663058.korean: - 불가사리가 배시시 웃으며 내민 손을 잡았다.

1000663060.english: Yeah. The others showed consideration so you could rest.

1000663061.english: But you still tried to work by hacking into the server, so of course you got scolded.
1000663061.korean: 그걸 서버까지 해킹하면서 일하려고 했으니 혼나는 게 당연하지.

1000663062.english: Can you say the same thing to the others?
1000663062.korean: 다른 애들한테도 똑같은 이야기 할 수 있어?

1000663063.english: - I answered with silence, and Bulgalsari smirked.
1000663063.korean: - 내가 침묵으로 대답하자 불가사리가 피식 웃었다.

1000663064.english: I understand that you love working, Commander.

1000663065.english: But you need to rest properly so you can work again next time. You can't shoulder everything alone forever.
1000663065.korean: 그래도 쉴 때는 푹 쉬어야 다음에 또 일하지. 언제까지 사령관 혼자 부담할 수 없잖아.

1000663066.english: I know you'd rather suffer more yourself than push it onto the others.
1000663066.korean: 다른 애들한테 시키는 대신 혼자 더 고생하려는 거 알아.

1000663067.english: But you need to remember how that makes us feel too. Gratitude taken too far only leaves guilt.
1000663067.korean: 그치만 우리들이 미안해할 것도 염두에 둬야지. 고마운 것도 정도가 지나치면 죄책감 밖에 못 느껴.

1000663069.english: - Accepting Bulgalsari's advice, I put the straw to my lips.
1000663069.korean: - 불가사리의 충고를 받아들인 나는 빨대를 입에 물었다.

1000663070.english: - Then, sitting across from me, Bulgalsari also sipped from a straw…
1000663070.korean: - 그러자 맞은편에 앉아있던 불가사리도 빨대를 물었는데...

1000663071.english: What are you doing? Not drinking?

1000663072.english: - In the cup between us was a special kind of straw.
1000663072.korean: - 불가사리와 나 사이의 컵엔 특별한 빨대가 꽂혀있다.

1000663073.english: - A couple straw linked in the shape of a heart, and since it was so short, drinking at the same time brought our faces close enough to feel each other's breath.
1000663073.korean: - 하트 모양으로 연결된 커플 빨대라는 물건이었는데, 워낙 짧아서 동시에 음료를 마시면 서로의 숨결이 느껴질 만큼 얼굴이 가까워졌다.

1000663074.english: Wasn't holding this date contest for things like this?
1000663074.korean: 이런 거 하려고 데이트 공모전 개최했던 거 아니었어?

1000663075.english: Then let's enjoy it. Why pull away?

1000663078.english: - As I was drinking, I suddenly lifted my head and saw Bulgalsari smiling.
1000663078.korean: - 음료를 마시다 문득 고개를 드니, 불가사리가 미소 짓고 있었다.

1000663079.english: Seeing you this close up, Commander, it really strikes me how handsome you are.
1000663079.korean: 이렇게 가까이서 보니 새삼 사령관이 잘 생겨 보여서.

1000663080.english: And thinking that today I get to have you all to myself...

1000663081.english: It made me feel a little happy.

1000663082.english: - At Bulgalsari's casually spoken feelings, I was momentarily at a loss for words.
1000663082.korean: - 불가사리가 대수롭지 않게 꺼낸 속마음에 순간 말문이 막혔다.

1000663083.english: - How should I respond? Should I turn it back and make her flustered, or just stay silent?
1000663083.korean: - 어떻게 반응할까. 역으로 부끄럽게 만들까, 침묵으로 일관할까.

1000663084.english: - While I was wondering how to react, the straw suddenly made a loud noise, as if the drink had already run out.
1000663084.korean: - 대처를 고민하는 사이, 어느새 음료가 바닥났는지 빨대에서 요란한 소리가 났다.

1000663086.english: We've finished brunch, and packed donuts too...

1000663087.english: Now it's time to dress you up in my taste.

1000663088.english: - It's not like playing dolls, and I doubt Bulgalsari would enjoy me just changing clothes. How could I make her enjoy it more?
1000663088.korean: - 인형놀이도 아니고, 내가 갈아입는 걸로 불가사리가 즐거워 할 것 같진 않은데. 어떻게 해야 불가사리가 더 즐거워 할 수 있을까.

1000663089.english: - While I was pondering, Bulgalsari tapped my nose with her finger.
1000663089.korean: - 고민하고 있는 내 콧잔등을 불가사리가 손가락으로 톡 건드렸다.

1000663091.english: You promised to go along with my wishes for this date.
1000663091.korean: 이번 데이트는 내 뜻대로 맞춰주기로 했잖아.

1000663092.english: Wondering if it'll be fun or not—off limits. Just follow along with what I say.
1000663092.korean: 재밌을까? 재미 없을까 고민하는 거 금지. 내가 하자는 거에만 맞춰줘.

1000663096.english: Maybe it's because you've got a good frame? Everything looks good on you.
1000663096.korean: 역시 옷걸이가 좋아서 그런가? 입는 거마다 잘 어울리네.

1000663097.english: - Before I could even sigh in relief, Bulgalsari held out another set of clothes.
1000663097.korean: - 안도의 한숨을 내쉬기도 전에 불가사리가 다른 옷을 내밀었다.

1000663100.english: - It had already been several hours since we arrived at the clothing store together.
1000663100.korean: - 불가사리와 함께 옷가게에 도착한지 벌써 수 시간째.

1000663101.english: - My brief illusion of this being a "light" date course was soon shattered, as Bulgalsari piled so many clothes into the cart that its wheels wobbled.
1000663101.korean: - 가벼운 데이트 코스라 착각한 것도 잠시, 불가사리는 곧 카트 바퀴가 휘청일 정도로 많은 옷을 실어왔다.

1000663102.english: - Oddly enough, there hadn't been any men's clothing here the last time I came.
1000663102.korean: - 전에 왔을 땐 남성복이 전혀 없었는데 어찌된 영문인지.

1000663103.english: Of course there are clothes in a clothing store.

1000663104.english: Of course. That must've been the case.

1000663105.english: Back then, teacher and I were busy, dear customer~

1000663106.english: - Since the two of them were in charge of Aqua Land's interior concept, I assumed they were busy, but their sudden appearance was unexpected.
1000663106.korean: - 두 사람은 아쿠아 랜드의 인테리어 컨셉을 담당하고 있어서 바쁜 줄 알았는데, 의외의 등장이다.

1000663108.english: There are as many left as glitter specks of nail polish...

1000663109.english: Pursuing true beauty is always fascinating, but it's not exactly our main line of work.
1000663109.korean: 진정한 미를 추구하는 건 언제나 흥미롭지만, 저희 주업이랑은 거리가 있으니까요.

1000663110.english: Sometimes, we need to fulfill ourselves in our actual profession.

1000663113.english: As expected, they recognized us right away.

1000663114.english: Definitely. If it were anyone else, maybe not...

1000663115.english: But sharp-eyed people would notice at a glance~

1000663116.english: I told you I'd dress the Commander up in my taste.

1000663117.english: Even just from looking at your outfit now, the others will notice my touch on you.
1000663117.korean: 지금 사령관 옷차림만 봐도, 다른 애들한텐 내 손길이 닿은 게 느껴질 거야.

1000663118.english: This works out perfectly. Do you have anything longer than what the Commander's wearing?
1000663118.korean: 마침 잘 됐다. 혹시 사령관이 입은 것보다 더 긴 기장의 옷 있어?

1000663119.english: And the hair… a perm would look good. Part it like this, see?
1000663119.korean: 그리고 머리카락은... 펌하면 예쁘겠네. 가르마 타서 이렇게, 돼?

1000663120.english: That's easy as pie~ Leave it to us! Come this way, customer.
1000663120.korean: 그거야 식은 죽 먹기죠~ 맡겨주세요! 자, 손님 여기로 오세요.

1000663121.english: Mmm~ I think I understand what kind of fashion you're going for. Please come to this corner.
1000663121.korean: 음~ 어떤 패션을 원하는지 알 것 같아요. 이쪽 코너로 오세요.

1000663122.english: - Just like that, Audrey prepared new clothes per Bulgalsari's request, and BoRyeon styled my hair.
1000663122.korean: - 그렇게 불가사리의 요청대로 오드리는 새로운 옷을, 보련은 내 머리를 다듬어줬고.

1000663123.english: - When we finally left the clothing store, it was an hour later.
1000663123.korean: - 옷가게에서 나온 건, 그로부터 1시간 뒤의 일이었다.

1000663124.english: What do you want to eat? You choose first.

1000663125.english: Hm? It's the donuts I like.

1000663126.english: I didn't mean it like that, eat. I just said it feels strange that the commander picked something I like.
1000663126.korean: 그런 뜻으로 말한 거 아냐, 먹어. 내가 좋아하는 걸 사령관이 골라서 신기한 기분이라 그랬어.

1000663128.english: Commander, try these on for a bit.

1000663129.english: - I put on the rimless glasses that Bulgasa handed me. Since they had no prescription, I didn't feel dizzy or anything.
1000663129.korean: - 불가사리가 건넨 무테 안경을 받아 썼다. 도수가 없는 탓인지, 어지럽거나 그러진 않았다.

1000663130.english: They give off an intellectual vibe, so they're nice. They suit you well.

1000663132.english: - At the café and the clothing store Bulgasa paid, but this time when I was about to pay,
1000663132.korean: - 카페와 옷가게에서는 불가사리가 계산해서 이번에 내가 내려는 순간,

1000663133.english: It's fine, today I'll pay for everything.
1000663133.korean: 됐어, 오늘은 전부 내가 낼 거야.

1000663135.english: I usually save a lot so it's fine~

1000663136.english: I saved up for times like this, so just accept it gratefully.
1000663136.korean: 이럴 때 쓰려고 모아둔 거니 감사히 받기만 해.

1000663137.english: - I asked Bulgasa, who was looking at me with a pleased gaze.
1000663137.korean: - 흐뭇한 시선으로 날 바라봐오는 불가사리에게 물었다.

1000663139.english: There probably aren't any girls who dislike shopping. The reasons are all a little different though.
1000663139.korean: 여자애들치고 쇼핑 싫어하는 애 없을 걸. 이유는 조금씩 다르지만.

1000663140.english: I like it because the process is fun.

1000663141.english: I enjoy spending time with someone I like.
1000663141.korean: 좋아하는 사람이랑 같이 시간을 보내서 좋고.

1000663142.english: Thinking about what I should wear to look pretty, and what I should put on my man to make him look cooler.
1000663142.korean: 뭘 입어야 내가 예쁘게 보일지, 그리고 뭘 입혀야 내 남자가 더 멋있어질지.

1000663143.english: Each of those things is enjoyable.

1000663144.english: - After hearing that, I picked up a purple hairpin similar to the one Bulgasa was wearing.
1000663144.korean: - 그 말을 듣고, 불가사리가 쓰는 헤어핀과 비슷한 보라색 헤어핀을 집어 들었다.

1000663145.english: A hairpin? It'd be perfect for a couple look, but…

1000663146.english: It doesn't seem to match your style right now. How about something else? Like this…
1000663146.korean: 지금 사령관 스타일이랑 어울릴 것 같지 않아. 다른 거 어때? 이런...

1000663149.english: Come to think of it, I've only been focusing on dressing up the commander. I should buy something for myself too.
1000663149.korean: 그러고 보니 사령관 꾸미는 데에만 집중했네. 나도 뭔가 좀 사야겠다.

1000663150.english: Is there any kind of outfit you'd like to see me wear? Or a hairstyle?
1000663150.korean: 혹시 내가 입어줬으면 하는 옷 같은 거 있어? 머리 스타일이나.

1000663151.english: - Among the sweaters displayed nearby, one in particular caught my eye.
1000663151.korean: - 근처에 진열된 스웨터 중 하나가 유독 눈에 들어왔다.

1000663153.english: Not bad. The commander's fashion sense isn't bad.
1000663153.korean: 나쁘지 않네. 사령관 패션 센스도 괜찮은데.

1000663155.english: - Both Bulgasa, who was checking out the sweater I picked, and I froze.
1000663155.korean: - 내가 고른 스웨터를 살펴보던 불가사리는 물론이고, 나도 표정이 굳었다.

1000663156.english: - It had been displayed facing forward, so I hadn't realized—but on closer look, the back was wide open. No, it was completely gone.
1000663156.korean: - 앞면으로 전시돼서 몰랐는데 자세히 보니 뒤가 뻥 뚫려 있다. 아니, 아예 없다.

1000663157.english: - If someone wore that as is…

1000663159.english: How could you walk around wearing something like that. It doesn't even cover the front properly.
1000663159.korean: 이런 걸 입고 어떻게 돌아다녀. 앞도 제대로 못 가리겠잖아.

1000663161.english: - Bulgasa, glaring coldly at me, pointed somewhere.
1000663161.korean: - 싸늘한 눈초리로 나를 바라보던 불가사리가 어딘가를 지목했다.

1000663162.english: Then commander, you wear that one.

1000663163.english: - As soon as I saw the outfit her finger pointed to, I lowered my head.
1000663163.korean: - 손가락 끝이 가리키는 옷을 확인하자마자 고개 숙였다.

1000663164.english: - Honestly, underwear would be better than that outfit… I understand Bulgasa's feelings.
1000663164.korean: - 차라리 팬티를 입는 게 나은 옷은 좀... 불가사리의 심정이 이해되는군.

1000663166.english: - After that, the two of us continued walking hand in hand around the Ark.
1000663166.korean: - 이후에도 우리 둘은 손을 잡고 방주 이곳저곳을 누볐다.

1000663167.english: - We sprayed perfumes we liked on each other, and stopped by tasting corners to try samples.
1000663167.korean: - 맘에 드는 향수를 서로에게 뿌리기도 하고, 시식코너에 들러 가볍게 시식도 하고.

1000663168.english: - At a candle shop we dropped by midway, we received calming scented candles as a gift, and while taking sticker photos together, I thought to myself.
1000663168.korean: - 중간에 들른 향초 가게에서는 마음을 안정시키는 초도 선물 받고, 중간에 스티커 사진을 찍으면서 생각했다.
