1000663169.english: - Just like Bulgasa said, maybe I too would start to find shopping fun.
1000663169.korean: - 불가사리가 얘기했던 것처럼, 나도 쇼핑이 즐거워질 것 같다고.

1000663170.english: - Up until then, that's what I thought.

1000663172.english: - I grabbed Bulgasa's hand just as she was about to head into the next shop.
1000663172.korean: - 다음 가게로 걸어가려는 불가사리의 손을 붙잡았다.

1000663173.english: - Shopping with Bulgasa is fun. I admit that.
1000663173.korean: - 불가사리와 함께 하는 쇼핑은 즐겁다. 인정한다.

1000663174.english: - But even fun times become suffering if they go on too long.

1000663175.english: - When one shopping ends, there's another, and when that one ends, there's yet another…
1000663175.korean: - 쇼핑이 끝나면 다음 쇼핑이, 그 쇼핑이 끝나면 또 다음 쇼핑이...

1000663176.english: - Eventually, I became mentally exhausted by the endlessly repeating cycle.
1000663176.korean: - 끝없이 반복되는 순환에 결국 정신적으로 지쳤다.

1000663178.english: Hmm... well, it's true the shopping lasted a bit long.
1000663178.korean: 흐음... 하긴 쇼핑이 좀 길었던 건 사실이니까.

1000663179.english: The shops are about to close anyway, so let's walk outside like you said.
1000663179.korean: 가게들도 곧 마감할 시간이니 사령관이 말한대로 밖에서 좀 걷자.

1000663181.english: There's an outfit I had my eye on earlier. Let's stop by just once more. Okay?
1000663181.korean: 아까 눈여겨 봐둔 옷 있는데 한번만 더 가자. 괜찮지?

1000663183.english: - To Stargazer, who asked again with a smile, I weakly nodded.
1000663183.korean: - 웃으면서 되물어보는 불가사리에게 힘없이 고개를 끄덕여 보였다.

1000663186.english: - When we arrived at Boran and Audrey's clothing shop, Stargazer suddenly let go of my hand and placed me in front of the store.
1000663186.korean: - 보련과 오드리의 옷가게에 도착하자, 돌연 불가사리가 잡고 있던 손을 풀고는 가게 앞에 날 세웠다.

1000663187.english: I'll just try it on and come right out.

1000663188.english: If you peek, you'll only bother other people.
1000663188.korean: 사령관이 혹시 엿보기라도 하면 다른 사람에게 민폐잖아.

1000663190.english: Who was it that promised not to come into the shower before, and then did?
1000663190.korean: 저번에 샤워실에 안 들어오겠다고 약속했으면서 들어온 사람이 누구더라.

1000663191.english: I said absolutely not, but someone slyly...

1000663192.english: Who was that again? I suddenly can't remember. Do you know, Commander?
1000663192.korean: 누구였지? 갑자기 기억이 안 나네. 사령관은 알아?

1000663193.english: - I tried to deny that it was me, but Stargazer's eyes would not allow a lie.
1000663193.korean: - 일단 난 아닐 것 같다고 부정하려는데 불가사리의 눈빛이 거짓을 허락하지 않았다.

1000663195.english: I'll just try it on once and come out. Got it?
1000663195.korean: 한번 입어보기만 하고 나올 거니까. 알았지?

1000663196.english: - Stargazer went into the store, and I sat on a bench, staring at the shopping bags placed on the seat.
1000663196.korean: - 불가사리는 가게에 들어가고, 나는 벤치에 앉아 좌석에 올려둔 쇼핑백들을 바라봤다.

1000663197.english: - Some were paid for by me, but most were paid with Stargazer's own money. And...
1000663197.korean: - 일부는 내가 계산했지만, 대부분은 불가사리의 사비로 결제했다. 그리고...

1000663198.english: - Most of the items weren't even for herself, but for me.
1000663198.korean: - 불가사리 자신을 위해서가 아니라 나를 위해 산 물건이 대다수였다.

1000663199.english: - Whenever I tried to pay, Stargazer stopped me, insisting she would cover everything today.
1000663199.korean: - 행여나 내가 계산하려 하면 옆에서 불가사리가 뜯어 말렸지. 오늘은 자기가 전부 부담하겠다고.

1000663200.english: - She always smiled, saying she was happiest when giving generously to someone she loved.
1000663200.korean: - 좋아하는 사람한테 아낌없이 줄 때가 행복하다고 얘기하던 불가사리는 언제나 미소 짓고 있었다.

1000663203.english: You've already visited our shop at least five times today, are you alright?

1000663204.english: Heheh~ I bet you're mentally exhausted.

1000663205.english: Even among women, some get tired of shopping, so I can imagine how it feels~
1000663205.korean: 여자분들 사이에서도 쇼핑을 피곤해하는 타입이 계셔서 어떤 느낌인지 알 것 같네요~

1000663206.english: Stargazer's been more fired up than usual too.
1000663206.korean: 불가사리 양이 평소보다 업된 것도 있죠.

1000663207.english: She even came by yesterday, checking if we were open and looking through the men's clothing for a long time.
1000663207.korean: 어제도 찾아와서 정상 영업하는지, 준비된 남성복이 어떤 게 있는지 한참을 둘러보다 갔거든요.

1000663208.english: So maybe... just for one day, how about letting her have things her way, dear customer?
1000663208.korean: 그러니 하루는 불가사리 양이 원하는대로 들어주는 건 어떤가요, 손님?

1000663210.english: - I scratched my head awkwardly and changed the subject.

1000663211.english: You're our last customers since it's almost closing time~
1000663211.korean: 곧 마감시간이라 두 분이 마지막 손님이에요~

1000663212.english: No thieves around, so all we need to do is close the door to keep the dust out.
1000663212.korean: 훔쳐갈 도둑도 없으니 먼지가 안 들어가게 문만 닫으면 돼요.

1000663213.english: - When I asked what kind of outfit Stargazer didn't want me to see, Boran and Audrey exchanged subtle looks.
1000663213.korean: - 불가사리가 들어오지 말라고 할 만큼 보여주기 싫어하던 의상이 뭔지 물어보자, 보련과 오드리는 미묘한 표정을 지었다.

1000663214.english: It's a bit... difficult for us to explain.

1000663215.english: It'd be better if you saw it yourself later, Commander.
1000663215.korean: 나중에 직접 눈으로 확인하는 게 좋을 것 같아요, 사령관.

1000663217.english: - At the sound of a scream, I ran toward it and shouted.

1000663220.english: Make closing time a little longer.

1000663222.english: - I opened the fitting room where the scream had come from, and inside was...

1000663223.english: Oww~! I stubbed my pinky toe...

1000663224.english: But this outfit. My back's completely exposed, so I could never wear it outside.
1000663224.korean: 그런데 이 옷. 등이 훤히 보여서 밖에선 절대 못 입겠어.

1000663225.english: And the side is open too, so if you felt like it, Commander...
1000663225.korean: 게다가 옆에도 뚫려 있어서 사령관이 맘만 먹으면...

1000663227.english: I guess I'll just have to wear it sometimes when it's only the two of us.

1000663228.english: I'll save it for when you're feeling down, Commander. Then this too...
1000663228.korean: 사령관이 기운 없을 때 준비해야겠다. 그럼 이것도...

1000663230.english: I... i-idiot! When did you come in, Commander?!

1000663231.english: I told you never to come in, you broke your promise again!
1000663231.korean: 절대 들어오지 말랬는데, 또 약속 어겼어!

1000663232.english: - With her face red, Stargazer screamed as I pointed to her outfit.
1000663232.korean: - 얼굴이 빨개진 채 소리지르는 불가사리의 옷을 가리켰다.

1000663234.english: Enough, just close the door! Hurry!

1000663235.english: - I quietly closed the door as Stargazer said.

1000663237.english: What are you thinking?! Not leaving?!

1000663238.english: Your eyes just now looked so lewd. If you don't leave, I'll scream!
1000663238.korean: 지금 눈빛 되게 음흉했어. 빨리 안 나가면 나 소리 지를 거야!

1000663239.english: I won't say it again. You've been warned.

1000663247.english: Let's just leave a note saying we went ahead.

1000663248.english: We could go in and join them, but...

1000663249.english: Hehe, there's an order to things, so it's better to yield this time.
1000663249.korean: 후후, 순번이 있으니 이번엔 양보하는 게 좋겠어요.

1000663250.english: Unbelievable! I said no so many times!
1000663250.korean: 믿을 수 없어! 그렇게 안 된다고 했는데!

1000663251.english: - By the time we came out, the sun had already set and it was dark all around.
1000663251.korean: - 끝나고 나왔을 땐 이미 해가 저물어 사방이 어두웠다.

1000663252.english: - Even on the way back, Stargazer's anger hadn't cooled, and she kept glaring at me.
1000663252.korean: - 돌아가는 길에도 화가 풀리지 않은 불가사리가 계속해서 나를 흘겨봤다.

1000663253.english: It's not something to laugh about!

1000663254.english: Do you know how I felt when I saw that note saying they'd gone ahead and left cleanup to us?
1000663254.korean: 먼저 간다고 정리 부탁한다는 쪽지를 봤을 때 내가 어떤 심정이었는지 알아?

1000663255.english: Now I can't go back there for a while... I had so many outfits marked to buy...
1000663255.korean: 당분간 거기 못 가게 됐잖아... 살려고 찜해둔 옷 많았는데...

1000663257.english: Doing that kind of thing outside, when the others were right there...!
1000663257.korean: 애초에 밖에서 그런 짓을, 다른 애들도 뻔히 밖에 있는데...!

1000663259.english: - Stargazer stopped in her tracks and stared straight at me for a while.
1000663259.korean: - 자리에 우뚝 선 불가사리가 한동안 나를 똑바로 바라봤다.

1000663260.english: I only did it because I was happy you liked it.

1000663261.english: Of course, there are other reasons too...

1000663262.english: But still, doing that outside is forbidden. Act according to TPO, idiot.
1000663262.korean: 역시 밖에서 그러는 건 금지. TPO에 맞게 행동해야지, 바보.

1000663263.english: Are you going to do it again?

1000663265.english: - Seeing Stargazer in the outfit I wanted and wearing the hairpin I gave her, I realized.
1000663265.korean: - 내가 원하는 옷차림, 선물한 헤어핀을 낀 불가사리를 보고 깨달았다.

1000663266.english: - Today's date must have truly been fun for her.
1000663266.korean: - 분명 오늘 데이트는 불가사리에게 즐거웠을 거라고.

1000663267.english: - So much so that worrying about whether it would be fun or not felt foolish—I finally understood she was right.
1000663267.korean: - 재밌을지 재미 없을지 고민했던 게 바보 같아질 정도로 불가사리의 말이 옳다는 걸 실감했다.

1000663271.english: - Hearing my answer, the corners of Stargazer's lips curled up slightly.
1000663271.korean: - 내 대답을 들은 불가사리의 입꼬리가 살며시 올라갔고.

1000663272.english: - With footsteps that seemed a little lighter, we strolled through the garden again.
1000663272.korean: - 어쩐지 살짝 들떠 보이는 발걸음으로 우린 다시 정원을 거닐었다.

1000663273.english: I wanted to send you off with dinner too, but it's already closing time.
1000663273.korean: 저녁도 먹여 보내려 했는데 마감시간이 돼서 아쉽네.

1000663275.english: It's not that I'm hungry. I just wanted to let you taste something delicious that I enjoyed.
1000663275.korean: 배고파서 그러는 게 아냐. 내가 맛있었던 걸 사령관한테도 먹여주고 싶어서 그래.

1000663276.english: There were so many things I wanted to do. One day really isn't enough.
1000663276.korean: 하고 싶었던 거 정말 많았는데. 역시 하루로는 시간이 부족하네.

1000663277.english: Oh right, are there any donuts left from earlier?

1000663279.english: - When I showed the contents of the donut box, Stargazer's eyes widened.
1000663279.korean: - 도넛 상자의 내용물을 보여주자, 불가사리의 눈동자가 커졌다.

1000663281.english: You eat it, Commander. I can just get another one later.
1000663281.korean: 사령관이 먹어. 난 또 따로 먹으면 되니까.

1000663282.english: What are you doing? Hurry and eat.

1000663283.english: - As Stargazer said, I obediently took a bite of the donut. The ones I ate earlier were good, but this one suited my taste even better.
1000663283.korean: - 불가사리의 말대로 얌전히 도넛을 한입 베어 물었다. 아까 전에 먹었던 도넛들도 맛있었지만, 이번에 먹은 게 훨씬 입에 맞았다.

1000663285.english: It's my favorite flavor, so I knew you'd like it too.
1000663285.korean: 내가 제일 좋아하는 맛이니까, 사령관도 분명 좋아할 거라 생각했어.

1000663286.english: - Smiling bashfully, Stargazer and I walked in step for a while.
1000663286.korean: - 배시시 웃는 불가사리와 나는 그렇게 한동안 발을 맞춰나갔다.

1000663287.english: - At our usual pace, we should have already been home long ago.
1000663287.korean: - 원래 우리 속도라면 이미 돌아가고도 남을 시간.

1000663288.english: - But we wandered through the garden far past that time, sometimes sitting on benches to chat and look at each other.
1000663288.korean: - 그 시간을 훌쩍 넘겨서까지 정원을 산책했고, 가끔은 벤치에 앉아 서로를 바라보며 잡담을 나눴다.

1000663289.english: - If Stargazer didn't have work tomorrow, we probably would've stayed out all night, but tonight we had to part ways.
1000663289.korean: - 내일 불가사리가 근무만 아니었다면 밤을 지새웠겠지만 오늘은 헤어져야겠지.

1000663295.english: Then do you want to meet again on the weekend? We could stay together until dinner.
1000663295.korean: 그럼 주말에 또 볼래? 그땐 저녁까지 같이 있을 수 있으니까.

1000663298.english: - Despite her words, Stargazer smiled bashfully.

1000663299.english: Alright, go on. I'll see you later.

1000663300.english: - Stargazer and I waved and turned to leave.

1000663303.english: - At the sound of her voice, I turned back, only to find Stargazer's face suddenly right in front of mine.
1000663303.korean: - 날 부르는 소리에 뒤돌아 본 순간, 어느새 불가사리의 얼굴이 코앞에 있었다.

1000663304.english: - Her playful gaze lasted only a moment.

1000663305.english: - I got to feel once again how soft Stargazer's lips were.
1000663305.korean: - 불가사리의 입술이 얼마나 부드러운지, 나는 다시 한번 확인할 수 있었다.

1000663306.english: - After a brief moment, Stargazer stepped back, brushed her lips with her finger, and nodded.
1000663306.korean: - 짧은 시간이 지나, 한발짝 뒤로 물러선 불가사리는 손가락으로 입술을 한번 훑고는 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000663308.english: That was my favorite donut flavor. I'm glad I let you have it.
1000663308.korean: 내가 가장 좋아하는 도넛 맛이야. 사령관한테 양보하길 잘했어.

1000663309.english: Who knows~? I'll tell you when we meet on the weekend.

1000663310.english: Okay, I'm really going now. See you, Commander.
1000663310.korean: 그럼 이제 진짜 갈게. 또 봐, 사령관.

1000663311.english: - Without giving me time to collect my thoughts, Stargazer quickly walked away.
1000663311.korean: - 내가 생각을 정리할 틈도 주지 않고, 불가사리는 빠른 걸음으로 사라져버렸다.

1000663312.english: - Left alone in the garden, I slumped onto a nearby bench.
1000663312.korean: - 혼자 정원에 남게 된 나는 주변 벤치에 털썩 앉았고.

1000663313.english: - Only after cooling my head for a long while did I finally return to my room.
1000663313.korean: - 한참이나 머리를 식힌 후에야 방으로 돌아갔다.

1000663314.english: - After an early lunch, I went to the shrine.
1000663314.korean: - 이른 점심을 먹은 후 신사로 왔다.

1000663315.english: - The shrine was quieter than the first time I came.
1000663315.korean: - 신사는 내가 처음 왔을 때보다는 한산했다.

1000663317.english: - Hachiko, who couldn't even greet me last time because of the crowds, spotted me while cleaning the shrine and ran over.
1000663317.korean: - 전에 왔을 때는 방문객들에게 치여서 말도 못 붙였던 하치코가 신사를 청소하다가 우리를 발견하고 달려왔다.

1000663319.english: - I returned Hachiko's greeting and patted her head thoroughly.
1000663319.korean: - 하치코의 인사를 받아주고 열심히 머리를 쓰다듬어줬다.

1000663321.english: - Hachiko wagged her tail in proportion to how much I petted her.
1000663321.korean: - 내 쓰다듬 속도에 비례해서 하치코가 꼬리를 흔들었다.
